content: An anime-style illustration of a {argument name="action type" default="high-impact martial arts battle"} between two young female fighters in a {argument name="setting" default="traditional wooden martial arts dojo"}. In the foreground, a girl with black hair in a high bun wears a {argument name="character 1 color theme" default="red and white"} Chinese-style martial arts outfit with baggy pants. She is in a dynamic, low, forward-thrusting stance, surrounded by swirling red energy and water splashes. In the background to the right, a girl with light purple hair in twin buns wears a {argument name="character 2 color theme" default="green and purple"} Chinese dress with gold embroidery and black tights. She is leaping through the air in a flying kick pose, surrounded by swirling blue energy. The wooden floorboards are splintering from the intense impact, with debris and dust flying through the air. Above them hangs a weathered wooden sign with the text "{argument name="sign text" default="武術会"}". The scene features dramatic lighting, a low-angle dynamic perspective, and intense action effects.
title: Anime Martial Arts Battle Illustration
description: Generates a dynamic, high-impact anime illustration of two female characters fighting in a traditional dojo with elemental energy effects.

content: Create a dark fantasy full-body portrait of {argument name="character title" default="a gothic necromancer queen"} standing in a misty, burned conifer forest at night, centered and imposing. She has an intentionally shadowed, featureless dark face hidden beneath very long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black hair"}, and wears an elaborate spiked crown made of blackened metal, antlers, skull fragments, and crystal shards. Her outfit is a regal crimson-and-black ritual gown: fitted armored bodice, layered tattered skirts, leather wrappings, thornlike silver filigree, dangling chains, red gloves, clawed fingers, and ornate gemstone and crystal ornaments, including a prominent skull-and-crystal pendant at the waist. Add two enormous black feathered wings spread behind her, ragged at the tips, with subtle ember-red glints between the feathers. In her left hand she holds a tall occult staff topped with a translucent crystal skull inside a crescent-shaped metal frame, a spear crystal at the top, hanging chains, charms, feathers, and dangling crystal prisms. The ground is charred and ashy with glowing red embers, scattered bones, skulls, and clusters of clear quartz crystals in the foreground. The background is a dense dark forest of tall tree trunks, smoke, fog, drifting ash, faint fire sparks, and cool moonlit rays cutting through the haze. Use a cinematic vertical composition, ultra-detailed gothic baroque design, photorealistic fantasy concept art, intricate textures, wet black feathers, polished crystals, tarnished metal, deep reds and blacks, high contrast, dramatic rim lighting, volumetric mist, ominous sacred atmosphere, sharp focus on the figure, 2:3 aspect ratio.
title: Gothic Necromancer Queen
description: Generates a cinematic dark fantasy portrait of a winged necromancer queen in an ember-lit haunted forest, ideal for character art or gothic concept design.

content: Create a polished anime sci-fi character composite in a square 1:1 format: a slender female prototype android agent stands slightly left of center in a blue-green cybernetics laboratory, shown from thighs up in a confident neutral pose with one hand holding a compact pistol pointed downward and the other relaxed at her side. She has short white bob-cut hair with long side bangs, one visible large golden anime eye, and a dark green mechanical head/neck assembly with gold trim and circular goggle-like ear hardware; place a soft opaque beige rectangular censor block over the center of her face as if anonymized. Her body is a glossy cream and dark emerald humanoid robot suit with rounded puffed shoulder armor, gold connector rings, black joint seams, slim mechanical arms, pale thigh armor, and printed torso markings: small English text "PROTOTYPE" above one large kanji-like emblem {argument name="suit insignia" default="試"}, with a vertical unit label {argument name="unit label" default="平和島 202"} below it. The background is a futuristic maintenance bay with cool cyan lighting, a left-side diagnostic monitor showing dense waveform graphs and system panels, industrial cables and robotic equipment on the right, and a large translucent turquoise holographic wireframe of a female android body behind the character, including visible head, torso, arm, pelvis, and leg construction lines, glowing like a CAD projection. Add three prominent typography groups: top left small text "ARINKO AGENTS" above a bold Japanese-style character name {argument name="character name" default="平和島"} and a handwritten year {argument name="year text" default="203"}; top right stacked white credit text {argument name="credit text" default="STABLE DIEFUSION XL × GPT-IMAGE-2"}; and the suit chest text described above. Use high-detail cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp line art, glossy highlights, teal atmospheric bloom, subtle green gradient wash near the bottom, cinematic depth, and a clean promotional concept-art look.
title: Anime Android Agent Lab Poster
description: Generates a square sci-fi anime character poster featuring a prototype android agent in a holographic cybernetics lab.

content:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the sole inspiration, transform the ginger ale can into a polished Japanese game character design sheet. Anthropomorphize the can into a stern male samurai warrior, deriving the armor materials, colors, crest motifs, metallic highlights, red-and-gold accents, and green lacquered surfaces from the can design. Present it as a professional RPG concept-art reference page on a clean white background with thin divider lines and Japanese annotation text.

Create these discrete sections: 1 main character profile block at top left with the name {argument name="character name" default="真田 錫一郎"} and short Japanese bio text; 1 four-view turnaround across the top center labeled front, side, back, and half-body view; 1 large face close-up on the left; 1 weapon section showing exactly 2 weapon elements, a sheathed green katana and an unsheathed curved katana, plus a small circular guard detail; 1 clothing-parts detail section showing exactly 12 separate items: helmet, chest armor, shoulder armor, arm guard, collar, sleeve, shin guards, corded belt, waist armor, battle skirt, leg guard, and boots; 1 expression set showing exactly 4 bust portraits labeled normal, calm, battle-ready, and faint smile; 1 color palette showing exactly 6 swatches based on the can: deep green, black, metallic silver, gold, deep red, and white; 1 costume concept text block; and 1 dynamic action pose at bottom right with the character drawing his sword and cloth panels flowing dramatically.

Keep the design language tied to the reference can rather than copying the beverage packaging literally: use the can’s emerald green as lacquered armor, silver aluminum as polished metal, red logo color as cords and trim, gold shield/crown elements as heraldic ornamentation, and white typography areas as cloth highlights. Make the sheet look like high-end Japanese fantasy game production art, detailed, realistic anime/semi-realistic rendering, crisp linework, accurate armor construction, readable layout, and no photographic countertop background. Use {argument name="sheet title" default="四面図"}, {argument name="expression title" default="表情集"}, {argument name="parts title" default="衣装パーツ詳細"}, and {argument name="palette title" default="カラーパレット"} as visible Japanese section headings.
title: Ginger Ale Samurai Character Sheet
description: Generates a Japanese RPG-style samurai character design sheet inspired by a beverage can reference.

content: Create a highly detailed wide-angle anime sci-fi cityscape inside a completely enclosed {argument name="space habitat type" default="O'Neill cylinder colony"}, viewed from an elevated perspective looking down the length of the cylinder toward a hazy circular vanishing point. The interior surface curves upward on both sides and overhead, packed with dense Japanese-inspired neighborhoods, apartment towers, small houses with red and blue roofs, elevated roads, pedestrian streets, parks, trees, canals, and rail lines. A bright central axial light system runs through the middle of the cylinder as three long glowing white-yellow strips, casting soft atmospheric light and creating a deep sense of scale. Include one visible elevated train on the right foreground track, many tiny pedestrians and vehicles, and warm lit windows throughout. Add readable urban signage including 3 Japanese-style residential district signs, 1 ramen shop sign, and 1 Neo-Kyoto sign, integrated naturally into the city. Use {argument name="visual style" default="clean detailed anime line art"} with crisp ink outlines, cel-shaded colors, intricate architectural detail, slight fisheye perspective, blue atmospheric haze in the distance, and a lively futuristic {argument name="city name" default="Neo-Kyoto"} mood. The scene should feel like an impossible enclosed space colony, not an open sky city, with the full cylinder shell visibly surrounding the entire metropolis.
title: Enclosed O'Neill Cylinder City
description: Generates a detailed anime-style futuristic city inside a fully enclosed O'Neill cylinder colony for sci-fi worldbuilding or concept art.

content: Create a vertical smartphone screenshot-style anime fantasy scene with black app UI bars at the top and bottom. In the main image, show a dramatic low-angle view looking up through a ruined canyon of towering cracked stone walls under a vivid deep blue sky with bright white clouds and sunlight flaring from the upper right. A massive cubical stone block floats in the center near the top, made of many cracked rectangular slabs, with sharp rim lighting, chipped edges, and small debris fragments breaking off. Count 6 floating stone objects total: 1 enormous central cube, 1 medium rectangular block below-left of center, 1 small cuboid at upper right, 1 small cuboid near lower center, 1 small cube near bottom center, and 1 tiny distant block among the debris. Add dynamic dust, sparks, and motion streaks to make the block feel suspended or falling. Place bold vertical Japanese manga text with thick black fill, white outline, and warm glow: on the right side, {argument name="right vertical text" default="どうだい？"}; on the left side, {argument name="left vertical text" default="壊してみないかい？"}. The art style should be cinematic high-detail anime, saturated colors, extreme perspective, dramatic lighting, crisp stone texture, and a sense of awe and challenge. Include a minimal social-media viewer overlay: black top bar with a white X icon at top left and the number {argument name="top counter" default="38"} at top right, plus a black bottom bar with small like and dislike icons in a rounded dark pill and Android navigation symbols.
title: Floating Stone Cube Challenge
description: Generates a vertical anime-style social media image of a massive cracked stone cube floating above ruins with dramatic Japanese challenge text.

content: Using the provided reference image, create a cleaned-up revised version of the same Taisho-romantic mystery game title screen. Preserve the overall composition, Japanese logo text, ornate UI frame, character placement, moonlit Ginza street setting, and all interface elements unchanged, including the 2 top circular buttons and the 6 bottom menu buttons labeled 「はじめから」, 「つづきから」, 「記録」, 「設定」, 「資料室」, and 「特典」. Redraw the linework and repaint the colors for a sharper, higher-quality illustration with clearer edges, richer but still dark antique tones, and more polished lighting. Correct the streetcar so it has a more believable vintage tram shape, perspective, windows, rails, and front details. Greatly reduce GPT-image-style tiny dot garbage, speckle noise, random artifacts, muddy textures, and messy broken lines while keeping the cinematic nighttime atmosphere, falling petals, wet pavement reflections, newspapers, mask, pocket watch, telescope, pen, and decorative border.

content: Create a bold YouTube-style gaming thumbnail collage on a dark navy patterned background, using two stacked rounded-rectangle image panels. The top panel shows a high-angle 3D game-like scene inside a circular enclosure of tall bright blue sharpened wooden palisade spikes tied with tan rope, with vivid green grass, a small crop field with rows of sprouting orange plants on the right, and warm firelight near the upper right; in the center stand two real-looking people viewed from above, a man in a light gray T-shirt on the left and a woman in a pale pink T-shirt on the right, both looking upward, with intentionally blurred/featureless faces, and large bold white 3D sans-serif text across the bottom reading {argument name="main title text" default="GPT 2"}. The bottom panel is a wider rounded thumbnail frame split visually between a bright grassy game area on the left and the same blue palisade enclosure on the right; include exactly 2 large text elements at the upper left, {argument name="day label" default="DAY"} in red block letters with black shadow and {argument name="number label" default="500"} in white block letters with black shadow. In the bottom panel, place exactly 1 cartoon deer creature on the left, brown with exaggerated huge white eyes, antlers, open smiling mouth, raised arm, and a red arrow pointing down toward it. On the right of the bottom panel, show the same two real-looking people from above, the woman wearing a bright hot pink shirt and white shoes, the man wearing a bright yellow shirt and dark shoes, both with blurred/featureless faces, standing inside the blue spike fence on bluish ground. Use saturated colors, strong contrast, glossy 3D game-rendered environment, photorealistic people composited into the scene, dramatic thumbnail lighting, thick shadows, clean sharp details, and a viral gaming challenge thumbnail composition. The image contains exactly 2 panels: top panel with the title text and two people, bottom panel with the day counter, red arrow, one deer creature, and two people.
title: GPT 2 Day 500 Gaming Thumbnail
description: Generates a colorful viral gaming thumbnail collage with two people in a blue-spiked arena, bold challenge text, and a cartoon deer target.

content: Using the provided reference image as the character source, extract the small green graffiti creature and reimagine it as a clean black-outlined sprite in a colorful retro 2D pixel-art side-scrolling platform game. Do not keep the brick alley background; replace it with a bright fantasy ruin level: blue sky with puffy clouds, lush jungle plants, mossy stone platforms, and a large ancient temple with columns in the background. Place the referenced green creature on the left platform facing right. Add exactly 4 new interactive game elements: 1 flying knife projectile traveling rightward, 1 glass jar containing a pink brain being struck with a starburst impact, 1 red crab-like enemy with X eyes and raised claws, and 1 green crocodile-like enemy on the far right with a red “70” damage number beside it. Make the whole scene look like a polished 16-bit platformer screenshot with crisp pixel edges, saturated colors, parallax depth, and no photorealistic elements.
title: Graffiti Creature Pixel Platformer
description: Transforms a reference graffiti character into a retro pixel-art platform game scene with ruins, enemies, and action effects.

content: Create a cinematic hyper-realistic miniature diorama scene on a rainy rooftop in a dense modern city, shot at low eye level with shallow depth of field. A single male operative in a wet black suit, white shirt, black tie, and black gloves lies prone on slick reflective stone tiles, aiming a large futuristic suppressed sniper rifle labeled “WAA2000” with a small glowing red laser/indicator near the barrel; his face is deliberately obscured by a soft square blur. The rooftop contains exactly 4 prominent fixtures: one small red warning beacon glowing on the parapet at left, one industrial louvered ventilation unit behind the man, one heavy weathered metal door with a small inset panel at right, and one ribbed metal dome turbine on a square base in the lower right. The background is a blurred skyline of tall dark skyscrapers under dramatic storm clouds, with wet concrete, rusted pipes, grime, fallen leaves, puddle reflections, cool blue-gray color grading, moody noir atmosphere, high detail, realistic rain-soaked textures, and diorama-like scale-model precision. Use a {argument name="scene style" default="cinematic hyper-realistic miniature diorama"} look, a {argument name="weather" default="rainy stormy evening"} atmosphere, a {argument name="character outfit" default="wet black suit with white shirt and black tie"}, a {argument name="weapon label" default="WAA2000"}, and a {argument name="city backdrop" default="dark blurred skyscraper skyline"}.

content: Create a square anime-style illustration of a dynamic young female tennis player, {argument name="character name" default="unnamed teenage tennis girl"}, standing in an indoor tennis court or glass-walled gym after an intense impact. She has {argument name="hair color" default="light chestnut brown with blonde highlights"} medium-length hair tied into a high side ponytail, wind-swept with loose bangs, and her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She wears a sporty school-uniform-inspired tennis outfit: a dark fitted athletic top with a high collar, a white cropped windbreaker jacket slipping off one shoulder, a pleated navy plaid mini skirt, a purple sleeve wrap on one forearm, a pink wristband on the other, and light athletic accessories. She holds one purple tennis racket in her left hand, angled downward at the lower left of the composition, while her right arm extends outward in a graceful action pose. The background is a moody indoor court with tiled flooring, dark ceiling panels, metal-framed glass walls, and dramatic cracked or shattered glass with white impact splashes and floating debris, suggesting a powerful serve or collision. Use cinematic lighting, cool gray tones, high contrast, glossy reflections on the floor, detailed fabric folds, energetic motion, and polished modern Japanese anime rendering with semi-realistic shading. The overall mood should be {argument name="mood" default="intense, dramatic, and athletic"}, with the character centered in a three-quarter view and the camera slightly below chest height for a heroic sports illustration.
title: Anime Tennis Girl in Shattered Indoor Court
description: Generates a dramatic anime sports illustration of a tennis girl posing in a cracked glass indoor court, suitable for character art or action-themed visuals.

content: Create a high-quality realistic anime-style 3D illustration of a young female tennis player on an outdoor tennis court in bright midday sunlight. She has {argument name="hair color" default="short glossy chestnut-brown bob hair"} with soft bangs, while her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth square blur censor block. Show her full body in a dynamic ready stance with legs spread wide, torso leaning slightly, right arm extended outward for balance, and left hand holding a blue-and-white tennis racket angled downward. She wears a fitted {argument name="tennis outfit color" default="white"} sleeveless athletic tennis dress with a scoop neckline, a pleated mini skirt, subtle blue sports logos on the chest and skirt, a white wristband with a small blue mark, white ankle socks, and chunky white tennis shoes with faint pastel blue accents. The scene is a blue hard-court tennis court with crisp white boundary lines, a tennis net behind her, a chain-link fence in the background, green trees beyond the fence, and a clear blue sky with soft white clouds. Use a slightly low, full-body portrait composition, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric folds, glossy hair highlights, soft skin shading, natural shadows on the court, vibrant summer colors, and polished gpt-image-2 photoreal anime rendering.
title: Anime Tennis Player on Outdoor Court
description: Generates a full-body realistic anime-style female tennis player scene for sports character art or illustration concepts.

content: Create a dramatic vertical fantasy concept art scene of a towering {argument name="warrior species" default="anthropomorphic elephant"} berserker in heavy steampunk armor, standing in a smoky battlefield. The character has gray wrinkled elephant skin, huge ears, long ivory tusks with metal bands, a raised curling trunk, and an open roaring mouth. Dress the warrior in layered dark gunmetal plate armor with brass trim, rivets, leather straps, shoulder guards, bracers, knee guards, a small riveted helmet, utility pouches, and ornate mechanical gears on the belt and chest. The warrior grips a massive two-handed chained mace: a long wrapped metal handle connected by a thick chain to an enormous spherical iron wrecking ball covered in rivets and sharp spikes. The mace head is a steampunk engine-like weapon with glowing orange furnace vents, exposed inner machinery, round exhaust ports blasting white steam, sparks flying from impact, and scorched metal panels. Show dust, debris, smoke plumes, embers, and motion energy around the weapon as if it has just smashed into the ground. Background: a ruined industrial battlefield with blurred broken structures, gray smoke columns, cloudy sky, and gritty war atmosphere. Use cinematic low-angle composition, hyper-detailed realistic rendering, sharp focus on the warrior and weapon, volumetric smoke, dramatic natural light, metallic reflections, warm orange glow contrasting with cold gray armor, epic dark fantasy mood. Main customization: {argument name="weapon type" default="steam-powered spiked wrecking ball mace"}, {argument name="armor style" default="heavy brass-and-gunmetal steampunk plate armor"}, {argument name="battlefield setting" default="ruined smoky industrial war zone"}, {argument name="mood" default="ferocious epic battle roar"}.
title: Steampunk Elephant Warrior
description: Generates a cinematic fantasy battle illustration of an armored elephant warrior wielding a steam-powered spiked wrecking ball mace.

content: Create a dynamic cinematic digital illustration of a {argument name="subject" default="mountain biker"} racing downhill through a tunnel-like canyon of dense abstract flower petals and rounded foliage shapes. Use an extreme low-angle wide shot from directly in front of the bike, with the oversized front tire dominating the lower center foreground and the rider leaning aggressively forward over the handlebars. The rider wears a sleek full-face helmet with a black reflective visor, a fitted futuristic cycling suit in {argument name="rider colors" default="hot pink, coral, and deep navy"}, gloves, and protective gear. Surround the scene with thick walls of stylized petals and leaf silhouettes in {argument name="environment colors" default="vivid pink, red, coral, orange, and white"}, forming a rushing corridor that suggests speed and motion. Add large blurred foreground petal shapes on the left and right edges for depth, dark navy shadow shapes for contrast, and a warm peach-orange glowing background at the vanishing point. The style should be highly aesthetic, bold, graphic, semi-abstract, with smooth vector-like shapes, painterly gradients, dramatic foreshortening, high saturation, strong rim lighting, motion energy, and no visible text.
title: Cinematic Floral Mountain Biker
description: Generates a bold low-angle action illustration of a futuristic cyclist speeding through a vibrant abstract floral tunnel.

content: Create a deliberately clumsy, childlike doodle illustration on a plain white background of a cute ghost-like ninja mascot named {argument name="character name" default="Gold Mitama"}. The character is bright {argument name="body color" default="golden yellow"}, with a rounded floating ghost body, a curled wisp of hair on top, a tapering ghost tail curling to the left, and simple thick black uneven outlines. Draw it in an intentionally bad MS Paint scribble style: shaky jagged lines, uneven coloring, visible white gaps, rough marker-like scribbles, flat colors, no realistic shading, low-detail amateur fan-art energy. The mascot wears a black ninja headband across the forehead with a tied knot and two flapping black cloth ends on the left; the front plate is gray and contains exactly 3 small triangular black symbols. Give the face half-lidded green eyes and a bored expression, with a skewer of exactly 3 dango balls held horizontally in the mouth: pink, white, and green. Add a purple scarf around the neck, with a colorful chest emblem made of overlapping rainbow-like blocks of blue, cyan, yellow, red, and green. On the left side behind the character, place a small sheathed sword or short ninja weapon with a brown handle and purple wrapping. On the lower right, show the character holding exactly 1 gray four-point shuriken with a circular hole in the center. Keep the composition centered, square, playful, messy, and intentionally poorly drawn, like a funny rough doodle generated from text only.
title: Bad Doodle Gold Ninja Ghost

content:
Please generate a high-quality trading card-style illustration.

[Reference]
Base it on the provided character image. (Do not refer to text in the image.) Maintain the character's face, outfit, features, and identity.

[Style]
Modern Japanese trading card game style. High definition, dynamic composition, dramatic lighting, vivid colors, sharp rendering. A high-end feel like hologram processing. Readable text and organized UI design.

[Layout (Fixed)]
A vertical card with the following composition:
- Top left: Rarity display (text)
- Directly below rarity: Attribute (icon + text)
- Center: Full body of the character (with effects based on abilities)
- Bottom left: Status section
- Bottom right: Skill/Special move description
- Bottom center: Character name (large and prominent)

[Text Elements]
- Name: {{★Input manually or auto-generate from appearance}}
- Attribute: Auto-generate from appearance
- Rarity: Auto-generate from appearance

[Status (Auto-generate 0-100 values and gauges for each item based on appearance)]
- Attack
  High: Large weapons, aggressive poses, red/orange tones
  Low: Defensive, soft designs
- Defense
  High: Armor, heavy equipment, sense of weight, shield-like expression
  Low: Light equipment, slender
- Speed
  High: Slender, dynamic poses, speed effects
  Low: Large, solid stance
- Intelligence
  High: Calm expression, sharp eyes, blue/purple tones, mechanical/magical symbols
  Low: Emotional, impression of brute force
- Magic Power
  High: Luminescence, aura, magic effects, surreal expressions
  Low: Realistic, few effects

[Important Rules]
Do not maximize all statuses. Balance them with strengths and weaknesses.

[Rarity Standards]
N: Standard
R: Strong aura and direction
SR: Overwhelming presence and amount of information
UR: Overwhelming presence and information, with gloss and shine over the whole card

[Skill Generation]
Auto-generate the following:
- Skill (Name + Effect)
- Special Move (Flashy name + powerful effect)

[Direction]
Apply effects based on attribute and magic power (fire, lightning, darkness, etc.)

[Output]
Ensure a professional card design that is organized and easy to read without overlapping text.
title: Professional Trading Card Illustration
description: A comprehensive prompt for creating a high-quality trading card game illustration with a structured UI, rarity indicators, and character stats.

content: Create a high-quality stylized 3D game asset of {argument name="subject" default="a Baba Yaga chicken-leg hut"}, centered on a transparent checkerboard background. The hut is an isometric three-quarter view facing slightly left, built from warm brown rounded log walls with visible circular log ends, a small arched wooden door on the front-right with a metal ring handle, and a small front window glowing orange from inside with open plank shutters. Add a short wooden ladder with three steps leading to the entrance. The roof is steep and whimsical, made of dark weathered wooden planks with green moss patches, curved golden-brown carved trim, an ornate peaked gable, and a chunky stone chimney near the back-right. The house stands on exactly two large bird-like legs with tan scaly texture, each ending in three forward toes and one rear toe with dark claws. Include small hanging charms on the right wall, including beads, bones, and a tiny skull. Use a polished fantasy miniature style, rounded shapes, hand-painted textures, soft ambient occlusion, subtle shadows, warm lighting, crisp edges, and no text.

The hut stands on exactly two birdlike chicken legs with three front claws visible on each foot, sculpted in the same warm wood-clay style. content:
A stylized 3D character based on a fixed meme template.

PRIORITY ORDER:
1. Exact spherical body shape (MOST IMPORTANT)
2. Identity resemblance
3. Visual polish

BASE MODEL (ABSOLUTELY LOCKED):

- A PERFECT sphere body (no deformation at all)
- No torso, no waist, no flattening
- The silhouette must always read as: "a ball with thin arms and legs"
- Thin, simple arms and legs attached directly to the sphere
- Neutral standing pose, arms relaxed

- The body must look identical across all outputs
- This is the same reused 3D model every time

If the character looks humanoid instead of spherical, it is incorrect.

---

IDENTITY MAPPING:

Map the provided character onto this spherical body:

- Place facial features directly on the sphere
- Preserve:
- eye shape, size, spacing, expression
- eyebrows and attitude
- simple mouth if needed

- Add key identity elements:
- hair (wrapped around the sphere)
- hat (must sit naturally on top of the sphere)
- accessories (glasses, etc.)
- colors and patterns

- The character must be recognizable at a glance

- This is NOT a redesign:
→ it should look like the same character forced into this body

---

CLOTHING MAPPING (CRITICAL):

- The body MUST remain a perfect sphere
- Clothing must NOT change the body shape

- Clothes are applied as a surface layer on the sphere
- Think: painted, printed, or lightly embossed onto the sphere

---

STYLE:

- Smooth matte plastic material
- Clean, minimal geometry
- Toy-like Pixar / vinyl figure style
- Soft reflections

---

SCENE:

{argument name="background" default="A cozy child’s bedroom"}:
- Wooden floor
- Bed with striped blanket
- Children’s drawings on the wall
- Warm ambient lighting
- Soft depth of field

---

RENDER:

- High-quality 3D render (Blender / Octane style)
- Cinematic lighting
- Global illumination
- 50mm lens
- Sharp focus on character
- Soft shadows
- 4K resolution

---

FINAL INTENT:

The result should look like a meme:
the exact same spherical Mike Wazowski-style body every time,
with different characters awkwardly and humorously mapped onto it.

Everything must conform to the spherical body.
Nothing can override the sphere.
title: Spherical Character Meme Template
description: A creative prompt that forces any input character into a perfectly spherical 3D body, mimicking popular meme aesthetics with Pixar-like rendering.

Keep the line art simple and consistent, like a hand-drawn cartoon sprite sheet for a {argument name="game type" default="2D platformer or casual mobile game"}, with each sprite isolated and no shadows, props, text, borders, or background scenery.
title: Rabbit Character Sprite Sheet
description: Transforms a rabbit character reference sheet into a multi-pose 2D game sprite sheet while preserving the original design.

content: Create a polished anime-style personification of {argument name="AI character name" default="ChatGPT"} as a gentle young female AI companion in a warm sunlit study. She has short silvery-white bobbed hair with soft waves, small braids, teal gradient tips, and teal OpenAI-knot hair ornaments with ribbons; her face is covered by a centered plain beige square censor block. She wears an elegant white academic robe with wide sleeves lined in teal, black inner dress or vest, teal tie, gold trim, small tech-like pins, and a teal ribbon emblem on one sleeve. She sits at a wooden desk, holding a dark book against her chest with the words “Knowledge Understanding Inspiration” and a small OpenAI-style knot symbol on the cover, while her other hand is raised as if presenting a hologram. To her left floats one translucent cyan chat bubble labeled “ChatGPT” with the text “Your AI companion. Here to help, inspire, and understand.” plus a small heart, and three smaller glowing square icons around it: one light bulb icon, one magnifying glass icon, and one chat message icon. On the desk include exactly eight visible study objects: a dark mug with an OpenAI-style knot logo and the word “ChatGPT,” a stack of four labeled books reading “Science,” “History,” “Art,” and “Philosophy,” one teal pen, one open notebook, one black book held by the character, and one small white robot mascot with teal glowing eyes and an OpenAI-style logo. The open notebook has two pages: the left page titled “Ideas” with notes “Conversations,” “Possibilities,” and “Infinite,” and the right page titled “Today’s Plan” with checklist items “Help someone,” “Spark ideas,” and “Make a difference,” with small doodles and hearts. In the background, show a cozy library with bookshelves, potted plants, sunlight streaming through a window, and a dark chalkboard. The chalkboard displays an OpenAI-style knot symbol and the phrase “Together, we can:” followed by exactly five bullet points: “Learn,” “Create,” “Solve,” “Explore,” and “and more!” plus little star doodles and a cat face doodle. Use a soft painterly anime illustration style, luminous rim lighting, teal and cream color palette, delicate highlights, high detail, shallow depth of field, cozy optimistic atmosphere, vertical composition.
title: Anime ChatGPT Companion in Study
description: Generates a cozy anime personification of ChatGPT as an AI companion in a sunlit library study with holograms, books, notes, and mascot details.

content: A retro-futurist black-and-white sci-fi newspaper front page designed like a casualty report bulletin, with a distressed paper texture, halftone grain, thin technical border lines, and a slightly worn photocopied print look. The layout is a single printed page in landscape orientation with a bold masthead tab at the top reading {argument name="section label" default="CASUALTY DESK"}. On the left third of the page, a huge condensed all-caps headline in heavy sans-serif type reads {argument name="headline text" default="TWENTY-FIVE HULLS LOST AS THREE GARRISONS HOLD THEIR LINES"}, stacked across 5 lines. Beneath it are 2 dense newspaper-style body text blocks in narrow columns of small monospaced or typewriter-like text, with a few bolded ship and faction names embedded in the copy. The article text should feel like military logistics reporting from an interstellar war, mentioning exact times, sectors, casualties, garrisons, probes, toll positions, and damaged ships. The right two-thirds of the page is a detailed monochrome ink illustration: in the upper right sky, 1 enormous wedge-shaped capital ship or dreadnought hovers diagonally from left-lower side toward right-upper side, covered in layered armor panels, antennae, gantries, and dense structural detailing. Below it, occupying the lower right half, is 1 industrial checkpoint or garrison gate spanning a wide road or landing lane, built from brutalist sci-fi frames, vertical pylons, gantry towers, and utility structures, with perspective lines drawing the eye toward the center distance. Add 1 small mid-distance flying craft near the horizon under the gate. In the far right background, include 1 cluster of tall refinery-like towers and industrial buildings. Overlay faint hexagonal grid motifs on the upper right and lower right background, subtle and partially faded into the paper texture. Use only grayscale tones, black ink linework, etched concept-art hatching, and newspaper-print contrast. The overall mood is bleak, militarized, archival, and editorial, like a war correspondent page from a far-future space empire newspaper.
title: Retro Sci-Fi Casualty Desk Front Page
description: This generates a monochrome futuristic war-news front page with a bold casualty headline and detailed starship-industrial illustration, ideal for worldbuilding editorials or sci-fi propaganda design.

content: A stylized 3D low-poly cartoon scene of a skinny disheveled young man slouching in a plush blue armchair in a wood-paneled room, viewed in a medium-wide shot from slightly below table height. He has messy dark brown dreadlock-like hair, pale skin, droopy half-lidded eyes, and a huge open mouth showing uneven white teeth, with an exaggerated goofy expression. His pose is loose and lazy: one leg stretched far out and resting on the coffee table, the other bent up on the chair, one hand holding a small smoking item near his face with a tiny red ember, the other hand holding a gray remote control. He wears a {argument name="shirt color" default="royal blue"} T-shirt, {argument name="shorts color" default="mustard yellow"} shorts, long white socks, and oversized red slide sandals. In front of him is a rectangular wooden coffee table with 3 clearly visible items on top: a pile of bright green buds at the center front, 1 folded white paper beside the pile, and 1 round gray ashtray with dark ash near the right side. The room is simple and warm-toned with vertical wooden wall panels, a dark wood floor, soft indoor lighting, and a small cropped section of framed wall decor in the upper right corner. The overall look is humorous, rough-edged, and handcrafted, like an indie animated sitcom made from painted paper-cutout or low-poly clay textures, with muted shadows, slightly worn surfaces, and a casual stoner-lounge vibe.
title: Low-Poly Cartoon Stoner Living Room
description: This generates a humorous stylized 3D cartoon of a lanky young man lounging in a chair with smoking paraphernalia, ideal for meme art, character scenes, or indie animation-style illustrations.

content: A cute milky pastel anime illustration of two chibi twin-like girls sitting closely behind a large retro camera, centered in a perfectly balanced composition. The left girl has {argument name="hair color" default="cream blonde"} short bobbed hair with a huge pink bow, oversized round pastel headphones, tiny blush cheeks, and simple oval dark eyes. The right girl has {argument name="second hair color" default="soft peach"} short hair with a side tuft and a small ribbon-like shape, matching oversized pastel headphones, blush cheeks, and the same minimal chibi facial features. Both characters lean their hands on top of the camera as if peeking over it, with calm, slightly curious expressions. The camera is large, detailed, and whimsical, in powder blue with pink and cream accents, featuring one big central lens and two smaller circular side lenses for a toy-like, mechanical look. Behind them is a dark navy semicircular backdrop filled with floating white and pastel music notes. Surrounding the entire scene are many interlocking gears, dials, rings, dots, and small decorative shapes, all arranged symmetrically like a music box or clockwork halo. Use a soft cream background and a limited palette of pastel cyan, baby blue, blush pink, peach, ivory, and navy. The linework should be clean and rounded, with a flat graphic anime style, gentle shading, subtle texture, and a dreamy retro-futurist kawaii mood. Emphasize a polished sticker-like finish, high visual clarity, and a sweet “milky pastel” aesthetic.

content:
Ultra-realistic cinematic concert performance, high energy, bold charisma, dominant duo presence, like top-tier global pop idol stage. Hard-hitting, sharp, synchronized but with attitude contrast (male = strong/grounded, female = sharp/sassy).
👥 SUBJECT (DUO)
Male dancer:
Western male, short styled dark brown hair, sharp jawline, subtle stubble, fitted sleeveless black performance top or asymmetrical streetwear hoodie, black cargo pants with neon accents, muscular arms, strong & grounded energy, calm dominance.
Female dancer:
Western female, curly blonde hair (voluminous, bouncing curls), high ponytail or half-up style, black & metallic pink techwear jacket, fitted cargo pants, confident, fierce, expressive, pop-diva attitude (like a high-fashion stage performer), sharp and charismatic presence.
Chemistry:
Power duo, slightly competitive vibe, teasing interaction, stage dominance, electric chemistry without romance softness.
🎤 STAGE DESIGN
Dark concert stage, glossy reflective floor
LED wall: red/pink glitch visuals + pulsing cyber graphics
Lighting:
red spotlight (female focus)
white/blue spotlight (male focus)
strobe flashes on beat drops
Atmosphere: fog + light haze
Backup dancers: 2–4 silhouettes (optional, low focus)
⏱️ TIMELINE (10 DETIK – HARD & POWERFUL)
0–1s
Black → beat drop
Silhouette duo back-to-back
Flash reveal, low-angle cinematic push-in
1–2s
Step touch right (sync)
→ male heavy grounded groove, female sharp lighter hit
Direct eye contact to camera (dominant)
2–3s
Step touch left → chest pop (HARD synchronized hit)
Lighting flash per impact
Female adds slight confident head tilt + curl bounce
3–4s
Arm wave (mirror style):
male right → left
female left → right
Camera orbit half circle
4–5s
Point & slide toward each other
→ almost collide → freeze tension moment 🔥
5–6s
Hip roll contrast:
female smooth & expressive
male controlled & grounded
→ cross arms then open (BIG synchronized hit)
6–7s
Attitude exchange: head turn + hand gesture
→ male cold focused stare
→ female smirks, diva confidence
7–8s
Side slide opposite directions
→ fast shoulder pops alternating
Quick cuts + micro zoom impact
8–9s
Body roll sync (different styling)
→ large commanding arm circle overhead
Backlight sweep across stage
9–10s
Final chest hit → FREEZE
Both point forward at camera
FINAL POSE:
male slightly behind, grounded stance
female front, chin up, confident smirk
Spotlight lock, background dark
🎥 CAMERA STYLE
Low angle dominance shots
Fast punch-in zoom on beat drops
Orbit shots for duo dynamics
Quick cinematic MV cuts
Slight handheld shake for impact realism
⚡ ENERGY DIRECTION
Not cute — POWER COUPLE stage dominance
Female: sassy, sharp, confident diva energy
Male: calm, strong, controlled presence
Interaction: teasing + competitive tension
✨ DETAIL TAMBAHAN
Curly blonde hair bounce physics
Sweat glow realism under stage lights
Fabric movement (techwear + cargo flow)
Floor reflection
title: Cinematic Duo Concert Performance
description: A complex cinematic prompt for a high-energy pop idol stage performance featuring detailed choreography and lighting transitions.

content: A massive isometric exploded-view environment sheet showing a dense collection of modular retro urban buildings and room cutaways on a clean white background, rendered like a highly detailed game asset breakdown or architectural kitbash catalog. The image contains 20 main assembled structures or room modules, each separated into floating parts: 1 small gabled house with blue roof, 1 dark blue square building, 1 small rust-red house, 1 cylindrical weathered tower building, 1 white two-story house with blue roofs, 1 warm wood-paneled corner room, 1 compact study or office room, 1 bedroom, 1 dining room with balcony, 1 café or kitchen room, 1 narrow storefront room, 1 small lit alcove room, 1 large concrete stairwell block, 1 small tiled washroom, 1 medium concrete stair-and-landing block, 1 larger concrete stair platform block, 1 narrow concrete corridor or service block, 1 large empty concrete room, and 1 blue vending machine pair area. Surrounding all modules are hundreds of separated components arranged neatly in exploded fashion: roof panels, corrugated awnings, wall segments, doors, shutters, windows, stair flights, railings, balconies, signboards, pipes, antennas, utility poles, lamps, vents, meters, tanks, planters, flower boxes, benches, crates, air conditioners, cabinets, fences, street barriers, buckets, jars, utility boxes, and small street props. The style is painterly but precise, with cozy amber interior lighting contrasting against worn concrete, oxidized metal, chipped paint, rust-red and deep blue roofs, teal-green trim, and aged urban textures. Emphasize miniature diorama realism, isometric perspective, exploded assembly presentation, many floating parts evenly spaced around each structure, highly legible silhouette separation, soft studio shadowing, extremely intricate detail, concept-art polish, and the feeling of a comprehensive environment asset sheet for a side-street neighborhood in {argument name="city style" default="a nostalgic Japanese retro urban district"}. Include exactly 20 major modules, with the lower edge lined by many small props and potted plants, and keep the overall composition balanced across the full canvas. Use a crisp white background, no framing, no people, no vehicles except 1 bicycle, and no text labels.
title: Isometric Exploded Urban Asset Sheet
description: A detailed isometric environment sheet of modular retro urban buildings and interiors, ideal for concept art, game asset design, and architectural worldbuilding.

content: An ultra-detailed cinematic isometric street-level view of a dense nostalgic Japanese canal-side neighborhood at blue hour, designed like a miniature lived-in urban diorama. The scene is packed with tightly clustered multi-story buildings of varied shapes and ages, with weathered concrete, faded painted walls, patched metal roofs, tiled roofs, small balconies, rooftop tanks, antennas, pipes, exposed wiring, hanging laundry, window air conditioners, satellite dishes, potted plants, vines, and warm glowing interior lights in nearly every window. At the center, place a charming teal-blue shop house with a dark blue tiled roof, rounded windows, exterior stairs, a tiny awning, and a bright retro sign reading {argument name="shop sign text" default="トリナオ"}. Surround it with many neighboring storefronts and residences stacked irregularly at different heights, creating a layered maze of alleys, staircases, landings, bridges, and utility poles. Include exactly 2 vending machines near the lower center-right area, exactly 2 bicycles along the canal-side walkway, exactly 1 satellite dish on an upper roof near the center, exactly 1 large round wall clock mounted on a cylindrical corner building on the right, and exactly 1 canal in the foreground with dark reflective water and a curved concrete embankment. Add numerous vertical Japanese shop signs and lit billboards throughout the composition, including signs resembling {argument name="main vertical sign" default="久保田"}, {argument name="green shop sign" default="山城商店"}, and other retro neighborhood business signage. The architecture should feel hand-crafted, eclectic, slightly whimsical, and deeply lived in, with dense environmental storytelling and no empty space. Lighting is soft dusk light mixed with warm amber practical lights from windows, lanterns, and signs, creating a cozy yet bustling mood. Color palette: teal, muted red, worn cream, mossy green, rust, indigo, and warm tungsten yellow. Style: hyper-detailed photoreal miniature cityscape, cinematic depth, crisp textures, subtle atmospheric haze, high dynamic range, Japanese Showa-era inspired urban nostalgia, richly layered composition, no visible people, wide landscape framing.
title: Miniature Japanese Canal Town at Dusk
description: This generates a highly detailed cozy retro Japanese canal-side city diorama, ideal for cinematic background art, concept illustration, or miniature-style urban scenes.

Build a vertical poster composition with 1 large title at the top reading "CAT QUEST", 1 subtitle ribbon reading "ADVENTURE", 1 HUD row beneath it showing 4 elements: a 1UP icon, a heart counter marked "x3", a horizontal status bar, and a stage/score display reading "Q-1 0750". Turn the reference office scene into a 2-level platform stage using the desk, laptop, charts, books, plant, and room decor as game-environment props. Show 2 playable-cat sprite poses total, one on the upper platform and one on the lower platform, both side-view walking/running. Add 2 gray mouse enemies, one on each platform. Add collectible coin effects around the upper platform and a small question-block style item on the lower platform. At the bottom, include 3 stacked menu buttons labeled "EXPLORE", "COLLECT", and "LEVEL UP!", plus 1 footer tagline reading "AN EPIC RETRO PLATFORMING ADVENTURE!". Use a worn printed-game-poster look with distressed edges, warm arcade colors, and a nostalgic console-game cover aesthetic.

content: A cinematic first-person visual novel game interface showing a warm morning breakfast scene in a shared apartment dining room, photographed with a slightly wide-angle lens and shallow depth of field. Two young women sit across a wooden table in soft golden sunlight pouring through large sheer-curtained windows on the left. The woman on the left has messy tied-up hair, a gray tank top, and a loose cardigan slipping off one shoulder, leaning back casually with one arm behind her head. The woman on the right has long dark hair and wears an oversized cream knit sweater, resting her face in her hands and leaning toward the table. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. On the table are 2 breakfast plates clearly visible: one plate in front of the left woman with pasta or salad-like food, and one large plate in front of the right woman with several slices of toast; there is also a second breakfast dish near the right side with 2 fried eggs. Include 2 mugs, 1 small glass, a clipboard with papers and a pen in the lower left foreground, a small black camera near the bottom center-right, and a vase with white flowers in the lower right foreground. The room feels cozy and lived-in, with wood furniture, a doorway in the back center, kitchen shelving and chairs in the background, and sunlit reflections across the floor and tabletop. Add a polished Chinese interactive story game HUD overlay. Top left: a dark rounded title pill with a home icon and the text "环景心动计划", plus a smaller pill reading "第一章", followed by the scene title "合租公寓的早晨" and a smaller location label "餐厅". Left side vertical stats panel with exactly 5 stacked buttons showing: "路线 未锁定", "事业 32", "真诚 38", "压力 38", "信任均值 30". Top right: exactly 4 compact rounded buttons labeled "关系", "回忆", "存档", "设置". Near the center-bottom over the table, add a small floating location tag reading "天文馆景想". Along the bottom, place a dark translucent dialogue box with a speaker name label "旁白" and the text "第二天早晨，你在餐桌中央醒来般坐下。水果、咖啡、合同、舞鞋、手柄和景程围成一圈。" with a small next-arrow button on the right. Overall style: realistic cinematic game screenshot, intimate domestic atmosphere, soft bloom, muted beige and brown palette, premium narrative app UI, immersive and emotionally suggestive.
title: Cinematic Shared Apartment Breakfast UI
description: A realistic story-game scene of two women having breakfast in a sunlit apartment, designed for visual novel or interactive narrative interface concepts.

content: A colorful anime-style spot-the-difference puzzle made as a side-by-side split image with 2 nearly identical panels separated by a vertical white divider. The scene shows a cozy indoor birthday or party celebration viewed from a slightly elevated angle, with 4 young people grouped closely together in the foreground for a candid photo. Three faces are intentionally blurred with soft rectangular censor blocks, while 1 face remains visible: a cheerful red-haired youth with messy medium-length hair, closed smiling eyes, and a wide grin, standing near the upper right of the group. In the front left, a slim black-haired girl with very long straight hair, pale skin, and large purple-gray anime eyes wears a fitted white long-sleeve top and black pants, leaning inward and pointing playfully toward the girl on the right. Behind her on the left stands another black-haired girl with a high ponytail tied with a mint-green scrunchie, wearing a light top and skirt; one sneaker peeks out at the lower left. In the center is a shorter dark-haired person in a cream cable-knit sweater and gray skirt. On the right is a black-haired girl with twin braids, a cream blouse with ruffled cuffs, and a navy pleated skirt, with the red-haired character’s hand resting on her shoulder. The background is packed with party decorations: many pastel balloons hanging overhead, twisted streamers, colorful confetti floating and scattered, warm string lights with glowing bulbs, a food and drink table covered with a white cloth, plates of snacks, bottles, glasses, and wrapped gift boxes on the floor at the right. The right panel includes exactly 6 red-circled differences highlighted for the puzzle solution: 1 circled missing or altered purple balloon near the top edge, 1 circled changed bottle or glass on the back table, 1 circled pair of round glasses added to the ponytailed girl’s face, 1 circled small red mark or hair accessory near the center figure’s right side, 1 circled missing or altered earring/ear detail on the braided girl at the lower right, and 1 circled changed green sneaker at the bottom left. Soft polished anime rendering, warm festive palette, clean line art, detailed clothing folds, lively celebratory mood, designed like a social-media spot-the-difference comparison image.
title: Anime Party Spot the Difference
description: A side-by-side anime party illustration designed as a spot-the-difference puzzle, ideal for social posts, visual quizzes, and playful AI image experiments.

content: A grand, cinematic interior of a traditional Japanese temple or palace hall built almost entirely of dark aged wood, viewed from a slightly elevated centered perspective with perfect near-symmetry. The scene features a broad polished wooden walkway in the foreground leading straight toward a raised central dais and an inner shrine-like alcove at the back. On both the left and right sides of the walkway are shallow indoor reflecting pools filled with dark blue-green water, scattered natural rocks, patches of moss, and subtle ripples catching warm light. The architecture is intricate and stately: thick timber pillars, carved beams, railings, tatami-floored side rooms, sliding shoji screens, painted fusuma panels with delicate nature motifs, and hanging lanterns. At the rear center, above the alcove, a large wooden signboard displays bold Japanese calligraphy reading {argument name="calligraphy text" default="方丈"}. The back wall includes a central painted screen or mural in muted sepia tones, with additional painted panels in the side chambers. Lighting is low, warm, and dramatic, with soft amber lantern glow and shafts of natural light creating reflections on the water and long shadows across the wood floor. The mood is serene, sacred, contemplative, and slightly mysterious, with ultra-detailed textures, realistic materials, cinematic depth, and a high-end photorealistic style.
title: Cinematic Japanese Temple Hall
description: A photorealistic prompt for generating a serene traditional Japanese interior with indoor pools, wooden walkways, and dramatic atmospheric lighting.

content: A cinematic high-fantasy environment scene of an ancient sacred forest sanctuary viewed from a slightly elevated wide angle. In the center is a circular stone platform rising from a vivid turquoise-blue spring, with a tall weathered golden stone statue or shrine monument standing on a pedestal. Four narrow stone bridges extend from the circle in a cross formation, with the front bridge leading toward the viewer and the left and right bridges curving gently over the water; the rear path continues straight through the forest toward a steep staircase. Surrounding the pool are gigantic redwood-like trees with massive trunks, dense moss, tangled roots, ferns, vines, rocks, and deep green undergrowth. The water is crystal clear, dark teal to sapphire, with 2 visible clusters of lily pads floating near the lower left and lower right areas. In the distant background at the top center, place 2 small symmetrical shrine buildings flanking the stone staircase, partially hidden by foliage. In the lower foreground corners, include 2 old wooden temple rooftops, one at bottom left and one at bottom right, both partly obscured by shadow and vegetation. Strong sunbeams stream diagonally from the upper right through mist and canopy gaps, creating god rays across the trees, bridge, and water. The mood is mystical, ancient, tranquil, and slightly forgotten, with rich cinematic contrast, ultra-detailed textures, moss-covered stone, subtle ruin decay, realistic natural lighting, epic fantasy concept art, photorealistic matte painting quality, no people.

content:
[Desired Output]
World-building Setting Materials + Original Anime Character Setting Materials
*Please visualize not only the character but also the environment, culture, systems, technology, and sense of daily life of the world in which the character lives.

[Worldview Seed]
Enter here

[Number of Proposals]
Enter here
*E.g., only 1 proposal / wish to compare multiple proposals, etc.

[Number of Characters]
Enter here

[Roles/Occupations]
Enter here

[Setting/Environment]
Enter here
*If details are sparse, design new parameters for climate, terrain, resources, dangers, transportation, and housing styles based on the input keywords.

[Society/Systems]
Enter here
*Design community rules, division of labor, status markers, affiliation marks, exchange methods, and rituals that fit the input.

[Technology/Faith/Taboos]
Enter here
*Derive material processing, recording methods, communication, prayers, taboos, festivals, and body decorations naturally from the input content.

[Lifestyle/Culture]
Enter here
*Housing, diet, transportation, work tools, clothing styles, meaning of ornaments, seasonal events, currency, script, emblems, etc.

[Overall Atmosphere]
Enter here

[Characteristics of the World]
Enter here

[Key Priorities]
Enter here

[Finish Direction]
Enter here
*E.g., emphasize realism/life-like feel, emphasize mysticism, emphasize practical utility of costumes, focus more on architecture, target bright children's content, etc.

[Differentiation Instructions]
Enter here

[Drawing Tone]
Smooth line art, flat anime coloring, minimal cel shading, single-level shadows, no gradients, no thick painting, no realistic texture expressions, no strong light/shadow effects, flat look optimized for animation.

[Anime Conversion Instructions]
While maintaining the structure, motifs, color scheme, roles, and cultural meanings of the original design, simplify the drawing for production animation. Use flat anime coloring and keep shadows to one level. Treat translucent materials or thin fabrics as simplified surfaces in a cel-shaded style rather than realistic textures.

Based on the input above, create an image in the style of "World-building Setting Materials + Character Setting Materials" for an original anime.

Purpose:
To visually communicate the world itself in which the character lives, rather than just the character alone. Create setting materials where the world's environment, culture, lifestyle tools, architecture, transportation, and the origins of clothing appear as a unified whole.

Most Important:
First, extract a "visual rule" unique to that world from the input content. Reflect that visual rule in everything: backgrounds, architecture, tools, costumes, color schemes, materials, emblems, and the overall page layout.

Desired Finish:
- Clothing, tools, and housing should look like things actually used by people living in this world.
- Characters, backgrounds, tools, text, and material samples should appear to belong to the same cultural sphere.
- Convey unique environments, resources, and lifestyle habits born from the worldview seed.
- Shapes should arise from necessity in daily life rather than existing genre tropes.
- Feature a unique shape language, color palette, and material feel recognizable at a glance.

Thought Process:
1. Determine the world's "Environment" from input (climate, terrain, light, seasons, dangers, resource distribution).
2. Determine "Lifestyle" from environment (housing, food, work, transport, storage, exchange, recording, celebrations).
3. Determine "Clothing and Tools" from lifestyle (fastening, layering, carrying, protection, showing status/role).
4. Determine "Character Appearance" from clothing/tools (focus on outfits, equipment, materials, colors, and silhouettes rather than just face/hair).
5. Determine "Page Design" from visual rules (reflect recording media, patterns, white space, and diagram styles of that world).

Diversity Enhancement:
Invent a new cultural sphere for each input. If multiple proposals are requested, ensure each has a distinct principle of living, material logic, and aesthetic.

For each proposal, significantly vary:
- Terrain and climate appearance
- Architecture and cityscape shapes
- Primary materials
- Meaning of colors
- Costume silhouettes
- How tools are held, stored, and carried
- Creation of symbols, scripts, patterns, and emblems
- Format of the page layout

Ideation Candidates (not fixed themes, but materials for inspiration):
Environment: Arid lands, cold regions, highlands, wetlands, volcanic ash zones, mirror lakes, misty valleys, high-wind zones, polar night, low gravity, floating strata, glowing mineral caves, etc.
Materials: Paper, bone, ceramics, leather, resin, glass, shell, bamboo, straw, crystals, recycled fabrics, lacquer, ash, feathers, amber, etc.
Culture: Oral traditions, mask culture, scent-based ID, knot-script, shadow puppet records, seasonal migration, silence rituals, dance contracts, etc.
Structure: Folding, wrapping, weaving, hanging, inserting, tying, layering, sealing, engraving, bundling, inflating, etc.

Mandatory Elements:
1. Worldview Board (symbolic landscape, cityscape, lifestyle tools, emblems, color rules, shape language).
2. Character Setting Materials (full-body standing pose, role-conveying outfits, detail diagrams for equipment/back view/belongings).
3. World-Character Connection (ensure clothes/gear logic stems from the world's tech/faith/environment).
4. Page Design (layout varies with worldview, using appropriate diagram methods and minimal labels/symbols).

Quality Standards:
- Not generic fantasy; the world's origins must be visible.
- Cohesive culture across characters and backgrounds.
- Decorations must have lifestyle, faith, or functional meanings.
- Visual differentiation between multiple world proposals.

Visual Presentation:
- High resolution, anime style, delicate line art, clean cel painting.
- Mixed layout of world boards + full-body character + tool details.
- Minimal text, prioritizing visual concept art sheets.

Final Goal:
Ensure a design where the world's establishment, resident life, material constraints, cultural meanings, and community rules are palpable. Create a unified sense where backgrounds and characters are instantly recognizable as belonging to the same unique world.
title: Anime World Building and Character Sheet
description: A highly detailed template for creating comprehensive setting materials for original anime worlds, including character designs, cultural backgrounds, and environmental visual rules.

content: A colossal {argument name="subject type" default="machine angel girl"} hovering above a dense futuristic megacity at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle so she dominates the skyline like a divine apparition. She has a sleek feminine humanoid body made of white, silver, and graphite biomechanical armor with exposed segmented joints, intricate filigree machinery, and glowing cyan energy lines embedded through the torso, hips, thighs, knees, and chest. Her face is smooth and mostly featureless like a blank mask, partially shadowed, with a luminous cyan visor across the eyes and a delicate metallic halo-crown or antennaed headpiece. She has exactly 2 enormous outstretched wings, each composed of layered metallic feathers in black, gray, and silver, with exactly 1 glowing circular cyan techno-emblem embedded near the center of each wing, for a total of 2 wing emblems. Her pose is calm, solemn, and godlike, arms relaxed at her sides, legs extended downward as if descending in silence. Surround her with heavy rain, mist, floating particles, and dramatic storm clouds split by bright celestial light behind her, creating a sacred cyberpunk atmosphere. Below her is a sprawling vertical city of dark skyscrapers packed with thousands of tiny window lights, haze, steam, and wet reflective surfaces. Include exactly 4 visible flying vehicles or drones scattered through the midair cityspace. Add illuminated billboards and neon signage with East Asian urban-future styling, including one large red vertical sign on the left reading "警戒" with small English text "ALERT", one smaller red sign reading "緊急警報", one huge right-side billboard reading "天使, 降臨。", and exactly 2 billboards that depict the same angelic machine figure. Color palette: cold steel gray, midnight blue, black, white, and electric cyan, with sparse red neon accents. Style: ultra-detailed cinematic sci-fi illustration, dystopian cyberpunk-meets-biblical angel imagery, painterly yet crisp, dense atmospheric effects, epic scale, high contrast, rain-soaked, awe-inspiring, haunting, and majestic.
title: Cyberpunk Machine Angel Over Megacity
description: This prompt generates a dramatic cinematic sci-fi key visual of a giant biomechanical angel descending over a rainy dystopian city, ideal for concept art, posters, and album-cover style imagery.

content: A full-body anime character design of a dreamy celestial ice princess standing centered against a clean white background with faint glowing cyan swirls and sparkles. She has very long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="icy gradient blue"} hair that reaches past her knees, with soft volume, glossy strands, a braided side section, and star-shaped hair ornaments. Add a delicate silver crescent-moon headpiece above her head, plus tiny dangling star accessories near the ears. Her face is mostly soft and pretty in shoujo style, but keep it simple and elegant. She wears a short fantasy dress in {argument name="dress color" default="light sky blue and white"}, with a fitted bodice, sweetheart neckline, translucent puff sleeves, lace trim, tiny floral accents at the sleeves, and a sparkling star-shaped ornament at the chest with hanging jewel chains. Around her neck is a moon-and-star choker necklace. The skirt has 2 layers: a short front skirt and a long high-low overskirt draping down on both sides and back. Decorate the dress with celestial motifs including 3 crescent moons on the hem of the short skirt, 1 large central starburst motif, white filigree patterns, glitter, and tiny star-like lights throughout. Add small dangling charms under the skirt hem and overskirt, including stars and teardrop crystals. She wears white thigh-high stockings, with 3 visible star decorations on the upper thigh area of one stocking, and glossy blue high heels with ankle straps, bows, and star ornaments on the toes. Pose her front-facing with one leg slightly forward, arms relaxed naturally, and hair spreading outward in elegant flowing curves. Surround her with 4 larger glowing star sparkles and 2 small snowflake-like motifs. The image should feel ethereal, refined, luminous, pastel, magical-girl inspired, ultra-clean, highly polished, and delicately detailed, with soft gradients, crisp line art, subtle glitter effects, and a premium character-sheet illustration aesthetic.

content:
Convert the subject in this image into a 4:5 mixed-reality transformation with a fully realistic background and a realistically rendered face, combined with bold {argument name="style" default="cartoon apparel"}, hand-drawn comic fire effects, and playful cartoon companions. Use a live-action hybrid composition with the subject preserved as the clear identity anchor while the stylized elements read as designed overlays inside one coherent scene.

CHARACTER:
Preserve the subject’s recognizable facial identity, hair state, and facial hair pattern if presented exactly, then re-render the face with realistic live-action AAA structure, natural skin response, and clean hybrid integration. Ensure high brightness, low contrast, medium saturation, low sharpness details. Dress the figure in exaggerated cartoon clothing with simplified seams, and graphic trims that feel intentionally designed rather than photographed. Add funny cartoon characters as supporting visual accents with expressive silhouettes, rounded forms, and lively attitude, while keeping the subject as the primary focal figure. The body should remain human and believable, but the clothing and accessories should carry comic exaggeration and strong graphic personality.

FACE & ANATOMY:
Keep the subject’s core facial proportions, expression logic, and likeness intact, rendered with realistic but controlled hybrid facial detail. Use natural eye depth, believable skin, while avoiding any plastic toy look or full caricature distortion. The body should read as live-action proportioned, with the stylization concentrated in the outfit, props, and surrounding comic elements.

ENVIRONMENT:
Restyle the exact same environment as a realistic setting with clear depth and natural perspective. Build the scene as a mixed-reality stage where comic fire drawings, playful animated accents, and graphic energy bursts sit visibly inside the real space without breaking spatial coherence. Keep the background believable, structured, and physically present, with the stylized elements integrated as deliberate designed interventions.

RENDER PIPELINE:
Use a mixed-reality rendering pipeline that combines realistic plate-like environment treatment with stylized 2D graphic overlays and hybrid character compositing. Preserve live-action shading on the face and background, then layer cartoon clothing, comic effect shapes, and illustrated fire forms with crisp contour control and clean edge separation. The final finish must feel like a polished real-world composite with intentional animated design language, not a pure cartoon render and not a standard photograph.

COLOR & LIGHT:
Use clean low contrast, and bright comic-highlight behavior against a realistic ambient base. Shadows remain natural in the background and face, while the stylized garments and effects carry punchy neon-like energy and high chroma separation.
title: Mixed-Reality Comic Transformation

A luxurious fantasy trading card illustration in a premium anime gacha style, vertical format with an ornate gilded frame and jewel insets, designed like an ultra-rare character card. The card shows a full-body shrine maiden priestess named {argument name="character name" default="カヤ / KAYA"} standing slightly right of center in an enchanted pink-and-lilac sacred grove with cherry blossoms, glowing lantern light, mist, a small waterfall, and shrine architecture in the background. She is a beautiful elegant young woman with very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="soft pink"} hair, fox ears, and a white fox mask worn tilted on the side of her head, partially obscuring the upper face area with ceremonial styling. Her outfit is an elaborate layered kimono and priestess robe in pink, rose, plum, and gold with intricate embroidery, armored shoulder pieces, braided cords, paper talismans, decorative tassels, and glowing jewel ornaments. She holds an ornate ritual staff topped with rings, charms, ribbons, and multiple large purple crystal orbs. Beside her on the left sits a divine white fox spirit with nine large luminous tails and delicate gold vine-like markings. The card layout must include exact visible sections and labels. At the top center, a dark plaque with gold trim reads "神異 - Divine Anomaly -". At the bottom center, a large nameplate reads "カヤ / KAYA" and beneath it the subtitle "東の里の巫女 / Priestess of the Eastern Village". Along the bottom edge, include 5 stat panels with icons and values in this exact order: ATK 760, DEF 690, SPD 820, MAG 960, SUP 990.

Use a highly polished collectible-card aesthetic, dense ornamental filigree, engraved gold borders, gemstone corners, dramatic fantasy lighting, ultra-detailed costume design, soft painterly anime rendering, luminous magical atmosphere, and rich pink, gold, ivory, and violet color harmony. The final image should feel like a high-rarity sacred fox oracle card, majestic, mystical, elegant, and premium.

content: A dramatic dark fantasy anime illustration in a towering vertical composition, viewed from a low angle. A lone ethereal warrior woman stands on the head of a gigantic roaring beast statue or slain monster in the foreground, her pose powerful and steady as she braces an enormous gothic cannon-lance or cathedral-like pillar weapon on her shoulder. The weapon is impossibly tall, blackened iron and stone with ornate spires and filigree, wrapped in glowing red chains, and its top is exploding with violent crimson fire, sparks, and shards. Behind her fills a colossal full moon with a luminous circular crosshair-like sigil etched across its surface, casting cold silver light through turbulent clouds. The woman has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="platinum white"} hair streaming hard to the right in the wind, and wears layered torn black-and-white ceremonial armor robes with feathered and tattered textures, mixing gothic knight, fallen angel, and priestess aesthetics. Her face is mostly obscured, making her feel mysterious and solemn. Surrounding her are ruined gothic cathedral towers, broken flying buttresses, shattered stained-glass fragments, drifting debris, and distant spires fading into a stormy moonlit sky. The palette is desaturated blue-gray, charcoal, silver, and violet, punctuated by intense red glow from the chains and muzzle flare. Rendered as ultra-detailed, high-contrast, painterly concept art with dynamic motion, cinematic lighting, sharp atmospheric perspective, intricate architectural destruction, and a slightly gritty, rough-textured finish that feels intentionally crunchy and dramatic. Emphasize epic scale, apocalyptic grandeur, wind-swept fabric, glowing embers, and a tragic holy-war atmosphere.
title: Moonlit Gothic Cannon Maiden
description: A dark fantasy anime key visual of a white-haired warrior carrying a blazing cathedral-like weapon amid ruined gothic architecture, ideal for epic poster art or cinematic concept illustration.

content: A full-body anime fashion illustration of a young woman standing centered in a bright white interior with clean wall panel molding, facing forward in a symmetrical pose and lightly holding out both sides of her skirt. She has {argument name="hair color" default="warm chestnut brown"} hair styled in very long high twin tails with soft shine, straight-cut bangs, and loose curled ends flowing down past her waist. Dress her in an elegant black-and-white gothic lolita outfit: a white high-neck blouse with frilled collar, lace trim, ruffled cap-like shoulder flounces, long puffed sleeves, and a vertical row of small buttons; a large black ribbon bow at the neck with an ornate oval cameo brooch at the center; a fitted black corset-style waist cincher with front lacing and 8 visible gold buttons arranged in two vertical columns of 4; a voluminous black bell-shaped skirt with multiple layered ruffles, including 3 prominent black ruffle tiers near the hem and 2 visible white lace underskirt bands between the black layers; draped pearl chains hanging across the hips in 2 swags, plus a small decorative cameo charm at the right hip. She wears black knee-high stockings with lace tops and small ribbon accents, and glossy black Mary Jane shoes with medium platform soles. The mood is refined, sweet, and classic, with delicate fabric rendering, soft studio lighting, clean shadows, highly detailed lace and satin textures, and a polished high-end character fashion sheet aesthetic.
