content: A dark fantasy visual novel screenshot in polished anime game art, showing 4 girls standing side by side inside a dim, old-fashioned crimson prison mansion lounge with deep red walls, dark wood paneling, a lit fireplace in the center background, and two warm wall lamps glowing on either side. The composition is a front-facing character lineup cropped around the knees, with ornate black filigree shadows and UI decoration around the frame, a silver crest emblem in the top left, interlocking gear motifs in the top right, and a small rounded "Auto" button in the bottom left. Put a Japanese dialogue subtitle across the lower center reading "——エマとシェリー、ハンナが同席だった。" in white Mincho-style text with a subtle glow. The overall mood is gothic, mysterious, and elegant, like a steampunk-inflected otome or dark academy visual novel. Show exactly 4 female characters. Character 1 on the far left: a blonde young woman in a simple white dress with a brown belt, long yellow gloves, and a royal blue hooded cape draped over her shoulders, holding a tall staff topped with a circular metallic ornament containing a glowing pale blue orb and a dangling red crystal; she has a red jewel set on her forehead and a calm upright posture. Character 2 second from left: a cheerful blue-haired girl with bright orange eyes, short twin-tied or bobbed hair adorned with blue roses and ribbons, wearing a small black hat with lace and bows, a navy-and-white layered outfit with capelet, oversized sleeves, bows, a blue plaid skirt, and a crossbody satchel; she smiles openly and holds a small handheld magnifying glass up near her chest. Character 3 second from right: a soft-looking white-haired girl with a short bob that fades to pink at the tips, pink eyes, a black hair clip and flower accessory, wearing a black-and-white outfit with a vest-like top and voluminous translucent sleeves decorated with pale pink blossoms; she gently holds a pink gem pendant or brooch near her collar and smiles subtly. Character 4 on the far right: an ornate doll-like girl in an elaborate green-and-cream layered dress with lace, bows, petal-like trims, white feathered or wing-like accents near the shoulders, and a lavish bonnet covered in flowers, ribbons, and netting; she holds a white lotus-like flower fan or bouquet in front of her torso. Use detailed anime facial rendering, glossy eyes, refined costume textures, crisp linework, warm rim lighting from the lamps and fireplace, and a slightly vignetted, game-screenshot presentation.
title: Gothic Visual Novel Character Lineup
description: This prompt generates a polished anime visual novel scene with four distinct girls posed in a dark gothic mansion interior, ideal for game mockups, story screenshots, or character ensemble illustrations.

content: A stylized cinematic illustration inspired by a neon-soaked Florida crime-game cover scene at sunset, showing two armed protagonists standing heroically on a wooden marina dock in the foreground, facing the viewer. The scene has a polished modern video game key-art look with pastel vaporwave colors, warm pink and peach highlights, turquoise water, and a clear blue sky. On the right, a tall athletic young man in a white t-shirt, open short-sleeve blue tropical print shirt, tan cargo pants, and a wristwatch stands in a dominant forward pose with both hands aiming a silver semi-automatic pistol toward the camera. On the left, a curvy young woman with long dark curly hair tied half-up wears a black crop top, denim shorts, layered gold necklaces, and a crossbody bag at her hip, holding a handgun pointed downward in a relaxed but ready pose. Both characters are centered and framed like iconic action-game cover art. Behind them is a bright waterfront city skyline with high-rise hotels and apartment towers, a low bridge crossing the water, several palm trees on the left, and glossy reflections across the bay. Include 1 helicopter in the upper left sky, 1 police speedboat racing across the water on the right with a white wake, 1 sleek black speedboat docked in the lower right foreground with visible bullet cracks in the windshield, and 1 white seabird standing in the shallow water near the left side. Strong late-afternoon sunlight, long shadows, saturated retro Miami palette, crisp cel-shaded digital painting style, dramatic action-poster composition, ultra-clean lines, highly detailed environment, wide 16:9 framing.
title: Neon Crime Game Cover at the Marina
description: This prompt generates a stylized action-game poster scene with two armed protagonists on a dock against a pastel tropical city skyline, ideal for GTA-inspired key art or cinematic promo imagery.

content: A clean full-body anime character concept sketch on a plain white background, centered with lots of empty space around her. Depict a slender young fox-spirit woman with 2 upright fox ears on top of her head, very long flowing hair in {argument name="hair color" default="silver white"}, and a softly blurred, featureless face for an unfinished design-sheet look. She wears a short wrap-style robe dress inspired by a kimono, with short sleeves, a wide sash belt at the waist, layered asymmetrical skirt panels, and 1 long trailing ribbon or fabric tail drifting to the right. Add knee-high fitted boots with simple angular trim near the knees. Her pose is elegant and relaxed, standing with one leg slightly crossing in front of the other, left arm lowered naturally, right arm raised with palm open. Hover above her raised hand 1 small magical flame spirit, glowing in turquoise and pale gold, with a curled teardrop shape and tiny wisps orbiting it. Render the figure mostly in delicate monochrome pencil or ink line art with very light gray shading, while the floating flame is the only colored element. Minimalist character design sheet aesthetic, refined manga proportions, soft clean outlines, airy negative space, no background objects, no text.
title: Minimal Fox Spirit Character Sketch
description: This prompt generates a centered full-body anime fox-spirit line-art character with a small colored magical flame, ideal for concept art and character design drafts.

content:
A cinematic night action scene inspired by arcade street-racing game HUD design, showing 2 Japanese commuter trains racing side by side on elevated urban tracks through a dense city at night. The viewpoint is low and slightly ahead of the trains, angled three-quarters toward their front-left sides, with dramatic motion blur streaking the rails, buildings, and overhead wires to emphasize extreme speed. The left train is a modern bright red commuter train with a cream front panel, route display reading 品川, and the number 2100 on the front. The right train is a deep maroon classic-style commuter train with warm interior lighting, twin headlights, the number 2000 on the front, and a circular headmark reading 競技 with smaller text 久里浜→品川. The maroon train is slightly ahead. The setting is a dark metropolitan skyline with illuminated office windows, railway catenary structures, and a distant Tokyo Tower visible on the right side of the horizon. Use a moody, high-contrast palette of black, charcoal, deep reds, amber window light, and metallic reflections, with a glossy, realistic photographic look.

Overlay a sleek white racing-game interface directly on the image. Include exactly 5 UI components: 1) top-left circular mini-map with a location pin icon, a simple route line, and the text 5.4 km; below it, two lines of Japanese text reading 京急本線 下り and 京急久里浜→品川. 2) top-right speed display showing large numerals 168, smaller km/h, a thin horizontal divider, and below that 4 段. 3) bottom-left vertical control meter labeled BC at the top, with markings 12 through 1 descending, letters B, N, and P on the left side, and a small green indicator near 7. 4) bottom-center horizontal bar meter labeled ブレーキ on the left and パワー on the right, with a blue-to-magenta-to-red gradient fill and a 0 to 200 km/h scale beneath. 5) bottom-right circular pressure-style gauge labeled kPa with markings 0, 200, 400, 800, 1000 and small labels MR and BC beneath, plus a matching vertical numeric scale beside it. Keep the HUD minimal, thin-lined, elegant, and semi-transparent, integrated like a futuristic train racing dashboard. Ultra-detailed, dynamic, realistic, dramatic long-exposure energy, no people in foreground, no extra panels or split layout.
title: Night Train Racing HUD Scene
description: This prompt generates a realistic cinematic image of two Japanese trains racing through a nighttime city with a stylized arcade-style speed and control interface, ideal for game concept art or dramatic transport visuals.

content:
[Character/Theme] = {argument name="character" default="Master Yi Xuan from Zenless Zone Zero"}.
A colorful East Asian calligraphic linear figure illustration, based on a white-drawing (baimiao) skeleton where line-drawing dominates the form, with freehand-style light coloring. Ink lines from a calligraphy brush, utilizing mixed-hair brush strokes, centered brushwork, with some flying white (feibai) created by side-brushing to achieve a dry-brush texture. Hair is drawn with fine, gossamer lines. The outlines are open with intermittent double lines, creating a play between void and solid. Large areas of negative space on a white paper background. Transparent watercolor glazing, light ink washing, with partial boneless-style coloring. The color layers are transparent and the color blocks are pure with soft edges. Minimal shading, scattered lighting, weak contrast, and flattened coloring. The character is drawn strictly according to original designs for clothing, hairstyle, and accessories, avoiding generic Hanfu templates to preserve the character's unique logic. Hand structures are accurate with five complete and clear fingers, natural joints, and elegant gestures. Fully colored with unified and clear tones for skin, hair, clothing, and accessories.
title: Traditional Chinese Ink Illustration Style
description: A detailed artistic prompt for generating traditional East Asian line-art illustrations with ink brush strokes and light watercolor washes, applied to a game character.

content: A breathtaking high-fantasy anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Leafa"} soaring high above a vast floating city of ornate gothic towers and cathedral spires rising through a sea of glowing clouds at sunset. The scene is viewed from a dramatic aerial angle, with the character centered slightly right of frame, flying diagonally forward over the city while looking back over her shoulder. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair tied in a very high ponytail with a large pale bow, pointed elf ears, a slim curvy build, and translucent yellow-green fairy wings made of luminous crystalline light. She wears a green and white fantasy outfit with gold trim: a short green dress or tunic, white armored chest detailing, a brown corset-like waist belt, white detached sleeves or fitted arm coverings, white thigh-high stockings with lace tops and dark garter straps, and brown knee-high boots. Her skirt, ribbons, ponytail, and wings stream backward in the wind to emphasize speed and altitude. The background is an immense sunlit aerial kingdom with countless detailed towers, domes, bridges, and castle-like structures piercing the clouds, rendered with intricate architecture and atmospheric depth. Warm golden sunlight pours in from the upper left, creating lens flare, rim light, sparkling dust motes, and glowing highlights across the wings and city. Use highly detailed anime painting, cinematic composition, dynamic foreshortening, soft volumetric clouds, radiant fantasy lighting, vibrant green-and-gold palette, epic adventurous mood, and polished gpt-image-2 quality.
title: Leafa Flying Above a Golden Sky City
description: This prompt generates a cinematic anime fantasy illustration of an elf-like fairy heroine flying over a vast sunlit cloud city, ideal for SAO-inspired character art and dramatic wallpaper images.

content: A polished anime fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Leafa"} from Sword Art Online, shown as a youthful elf girl with long golden-blonde hair in a very high ponytail tied with a large pale green bow, loose side bangs, and two thin front braids framing her face. She has pointed elf ears, vivid green eyes, and a soft confident smile while looking directly at the viewer. She is posed in midair or perched on a cloud with one knee raised close to her chest and both arms wrapped around her leg, creating a dynamic foreshortened composition from a slightly low angle. Give her translucent pale mint fairy wings glowing behind her, spread wide and luminous. Her outfit is the classic green fairy warrior costume: a deep green tunic dress with white trim and layered skirt panels, white long sleeves, white thigh-high stockings with jagged upper edges, dark brown belts and straps at the waist and thighs, and brown knee-high leather boots. The scene is set high above a sunlit fantasy city with tall stone towers, ornate architecture, bridges, drifting clouds, and warm golden sunset light. Use a soft atmospheric background blur, cinematic rim light, subtle sparkles, and clean high-detail anime rendering with vibrant colors, smooth shading, and an airy heroic mood.
title: Leafa Fairy Anime Sky Portrait
description: A dynamic anime illustration prompt for creating Leafa-like fantasy character art with glowing wings above a sunlit medieval city.

content: A monochrome black-ink line drawing designed specifically as a 360-degree panorama in equirectangular projection, with strong panoramic warping and curved architectural lines across the entire extra-wide frame. The scene is a narrow outdoor landing or walkway in a dense Japanese urban residential neighborhood, viewed from eye level, with the left and right edges bending upward as if wrapped for VR or polar panorama conversion. In the left foreground, a young woman with a deliberately blurred face crouches on the concrete floor near a metal railing, wearing a loose short-sleeve T-shirt with a dark chest pocket, shorts, and sneakers; her medium-length dark hair hangs forward. Next to her, exactly 1 black cat sits on the ground facing toward the city view. Also in the left foreground are exactly 1 closed umbrella leaning against the wall, exactly 2 plant pots, exactly 1 outdoor air-conditioning unit, exactly 1 mailbox, exactly 1 doorbell/intercom, and exactly 1 vertical apartment sign reading “201 コーポ ハルカ.” The midground opens to a descending staircase and tightly packed houses and apartment buildings with balconies, awnings, windows, utility boxes, and narrow alleyways. The background is filled with an intricate web of power poles, transformers, and overhead electrical wires stretching across the sky in dramatic arcs. Render everything with fine pen-and-ink hatching, sketchbook crosshatching, architectural detail, and a quiet observational manga-travel-sketch aesthetic on a clean white background, no color, no gray wash except the intentional face blur. Emphasize everyday realism, dense city texture, slight fisheye distortion, and the feeling of standing inside a hand-drawn panoramic slice of Tokyo. Use {argument name="aspect ratio" default="2:1"} panoramic composition and preserve the image as a seamless 360 environment illustration suitable for conversion into a polar panorama. Optionally let the crouching subject be {argument name="character description" default="young woman in casual summer clothes"} and the neighborhood be {argument name="location style" default="dense Japanese residential backstreet"}.
title: Ink 360 Panorama of Tokyo Backstreet
description: A hand-drawn black-and-white panoramic city sketch for creating immersive 360-degree Japanese urban scenes with a human figure and cat.

content: A highly polished parody trading card in the style of a classic Pokémon card, featuring {argument name="character name" default="Richard Feynman"} as the subject. Vertical card layout with a thick metallic gold border, rounded corners, glossy collectible finish, and dense printed card UI. At the top left, a silver capsule label reading "BASIC". Across the top, the large bold name "{argument name="character name" default="Richard Feynman"}" in black with white outline, and beneath it a silver banner subtitle reading "{argument name="subtitle" default="Theoretical Physicist"}". Top right shows "HP 120" next to a purple psychic-eye icon. The main illustration is a dramatic painterly portrait of Richard Feynman from the waist up, wearing a slightly wrinkled white short-sleeve button-up shirt with pens in the chest pocket, curly dark hair, and expressive hand gestures as if explaining physics; his face is obscured by a plain rectangular blur/block. The background is split visually: on the left, a dark chalkboard filled with handwritten physics equations and symbols, including a Lagrangian, psi notation, summation, and small Feynman diagram sketches; also visible is a quote in white chalk text, "The Universe is made of atoms, but atoms are made of stories. – R. Feynman". At the lower left of the art box is a stack of books with an atom emblem and a black-and-gold badge reading "LEGEND". On the right side of the art box, a vibrant cosmic scene with glowing particles, orbital paths, spirals, electric curls, and luminous galaxy-like swirls in blue, violet, gold, and orange. At the lower right of the illustration sits a white mug printed with the text "There's Plenty of Room at the Bottom". Beneath the portrait, a narrow silver stat strip reads "NO. 1918 Theoretical Physicist HT: 5’6” WT: 135 lbs.". The lower half of the card has a holographic purple-blue nebula background with card text panels. First is a red gradient pill-shaped label reading "Ability", followed by the ability name in large purple text: "{argument name="ability name" default="Path Integral Intuition"}" with a purple psychic-eye icon to the right. Below it, small black rules text: "Once during your turn, you may look at the top 4 cards of your deck and put them back in any order. Then, you may draw a card. This ability represents Feynman’s mastery of seeing multiple possibilities and choosing elegant paths." Below that are 2 attacks. Attack 1 has 3 cost icons: 2 purple psychic-eye icons and 1 colorless star icon; title "Feynman Diagrams" with damage "60+" on the right; body text: "This attack does 60 more damage for each different type of Pokémon in your opponent’s Active Pokémon’s Retreat Cost." Attack 2 has 3 cost icons: 2 purple psychic-eye icons and 1 colorless star icon; title "There’s Plenty of Room" with damage "100" on the right; body text: "Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck." Near the bottom is an italic flavor quote: "I would rather have questions that can’t be answered than answers that can’t be questioned." – Richard Feynman. The bottom status bar contains exactly 3 labeled sections: weakness with a blue water-drop icon and "×2", resistance with a dark shield icon and "-30", and retreat with 2 colorless star icons. Bottom left has tiny print "Illus. Ben Wootten" and card number text "002/150" with a small star rarity symbol. Bottom right includes a small black silhouette of a standing man gesturing. Overall style: premium fan-made scientist trading card, nostalgic TCG typography, painterly realism for the portrait, holographic galaxy foil textures, crisp printed text, and playful crossover design.
title: Richard Feynman Psychic Trading Card
description: A fan-made collectible trading card prompt for generating a polished parody TCG card of Richard Feynman with cosmic physics imagery and dense game-style text.

content: A full-body studio render of a high-detail transforming anime mecha inspired by a red jet fighter robot, standing in a confident three-quarter front pose against a clean light gray seamless background. The robot has a heroic, angular silhouette with 2 tall vertical fins rising behind the head, 2 swept-back airplane wings mounted on the back and shoulders, and 2 forearm-mounted blaster cannons pointing downward. The armor is predominantly {argument name="primary armor color" default="bright red"} with white wing panels and lower legs, dark navy-charcoal inner frame and thighs, small yellow vent details on the chest and shoulders, and a glossy translucent blue cockpit canopy centered on the chest. The head is compact and mechanical with a dark faceplate and helmet-like structure, partially recessed between the shoulder assemblies. Add a small purple Decepticon-style insignia printed on the robot’s right wing. Emphasize hard-surface panel lines, layered mechanical plating, realistic joints, pistons, vents, intakes, and premium plastic-and-metal model-kit textures. The wings should have sharp aerodynamic edges with red striping, the shoulders should look like jet engine housings, and the legs should be bulky and armored with asymmetrical aircraft parts attached, including 2 small side fins near the calves and 1 visible missile-like detail on the outer right shin. Use crisp product-photography lighting, ultra-sharp focus, subtle shadow under the feet, and a polished collectible-toy / concept-art presentation in the style of a modern Japanese mecha design sheet.

content: A hyper-detailed anime-style illustration of a {argument name="character type" default="rugged middle-aged man"} at a wild tropical dance party, shown from a dramatic low angle with the camera close to his torso. He has an extremely muscular, bodybuilder physique with sharply defined abs, broad chest, visible sweat droplets glistening across his skin, a slightly hairy jawline and neck, and messy short light-brown hair. His face is mostly out of frame or obscured, keeping the focus on his physique and action. He wears an open {argument name="shirt style" default="bright floral Hawaiian shirt"} with large multicolored hibiscus flowers, no undershirt, and a gold chain necklace with a round pendant. In both hands he is shaking 2 large maracas, one thrust toward the viewer on the left foreground and one on the right side, each striped in red, yellow, green, and black, with strong motion blur to show energetic movement. The background is a packed nightclub or festival crowd with raised hands, neon laser beams, fireworks-like bursts of light, colorful bokeh, and falling confetti pieces everywhere. Use an explosive palette of magenta, purple, blue, gold, green, and hot pink, with glossy highlights, intense rim lighting, exaggerated perspective, dynamic foreshortening, and a celebratory, over-the-top party atmosphere. Make it look like high-end polished anime key art with crisp linework, dramatic shading, sparkling effects, and maximum energy.

content:
A highly detailed, warm, whimsical isometric interior of a two-story dinosaur museum packed with chibi anime children and fossil exhibits, rendered like a handcrafted miniature diorama with toy-like figures, glossy eyes, soft rounded faces, and intricate wood-and-brass museum furniture. The scene is viewed from an elevated corner angle looking down into a bustling central hall with exactingly arranged displays and visitors everywhere. Include approximately 52 chibi children scattered throughout the museum, with a crowded upper balcony and busy ground floor, each dressed like young explorers in colorful casual clothes, backpacks, caps, jackets, shorts, and sneakers, many holding guidebooks or pamphlets. The setting should feel cheerful and adventurous, with golden ambient lighting from small hanging lamps, polished wooden railings, staircases on the left, tiled stone flooring, framed dinosaur posters on the walls, educational signs, specimen cases, bookshelves, plants, and gift-shop-like display tables.

Feature 6 major dinosaur skeleton exhibits clearly visible: 1 large Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton dominating the right side upper floor with open jaws, 1 medium theropod skeleton in the center-right ground floor exhibit pit, 1 triceratops skull and partial skeleton display on the lower right, 1 long-necked partial skeleton running vertically along the lower left edge, 1 large fossilized skull display in the lower center foreground, and 1 small fossil or turtle-like specimen on top of a wooden cabinet at the far lower right. Also include 5 glass display cases or tabletop specimen exhibits: 1 central rectangular butterfly or insect specimen table in the lower middle, 1 glass-topped fossil case left of center, 1 smaller blue-topped specimen counter near the middle left, 1 angled educational control panel or fossil information stand beside the central dinosaur pit, and 1 additional exhibit table integrated into the lower-right work area. Add many smaller fossil trays, bones, rocks, and excavation samples across counters and floor exhibits.

The architecture should include 2 visible levels: 1 upper mezzanine balcony wrapping around the back and right sides, and 1 open ground floor exhibition space below. Show 1 staircase ascending along the left side to the balcony. On the upper walls, place several framed dinosaur posters and museum boards, including one prominent poster reading {argument name="poster title" default="DINOSAURS"}. Add an emergency exit sign above a back doorway. Use a rich palette of honey-brown wood, beige fossils, teal and blue exhibit graphics, and pops of red, yellow, and green in the children’s outfits. The overall mood is playful discovery, like a children’s science museum mixed with a collector’s model world, with extreme scene density, crisp focus, high detail, cinematic depth, and premium storybook miniature realism. No adults, no empty space, no modern minimalism; every part of the image should be filled with charming museum activity.
title: Chibi Dinosaur Museum Diorama
description: This prompt generates a densely detailed miniature-style dinosaur museum interior filled with chibi child explorers, ideal for whimsical poster art or storybook-style scene creation.

content: A highly detailed futuristic anime-style illustration of a female android engineer in a narrow industrial maintenance room, standing behind a waist-high machine workbench and facing the viewer. She has a sleek short bob haircut with straight bangs, in {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"}, and wears subtle rectangular glasses. Her face is calm and focused. Her body is a glossy white-and-black biomechanical suit with realistic panel seams, exposed mechanical abdomen components, articulated gray robotic hands, and a small chest marking reading "RC19". The overall look is elegant, feminine, and mechanical rather than bulky. She is posed with both hands resting on a large rectangular control platform in front of her, a heavy metallic device with rounded black corner housings, a white top panel, four visible bolt posts, a central circular port, technical printed labels, and an orange front strip labeled {argument name="front machine label" default="MANIC"}. The scene is lit by a single overhead industrial lamp centered above her head, creating dramatic warm highlights on the polished armor and metal surfaces. The room is dense with black pipes and bundled cables running along the ceiling and walls, with metallic wall panels, a small warning plaque on the left wall, a maintenance notice sheet on the right wall, a compact control box, and a floor cable looping near the machine. On the right side, include 1 angled diagnostic monitor displaying a cyan holographic-style interface with a humanoid body diagram, status graphs, and a circular readout showing "98%". Next to it, include 1 small auxiliary console box with buttons and a small illuminated label reading {argument name="console text" default="LINK ONLINE"}. The mood is cybernetic maintenance, precision engineering, and quiet industrial sci-fi realism. Use a centered full-body-to-knees composition, slightly low eye level, crisp linework, glossy reflections, intricate hard-surface detailing, realistic metal textures, cinematic contrast, warm overhead light against cool screen glow, and a polished high-end concept art finish.
title: Android Engineer in Maintenance Bay
description: This prompt generates a polished sci-fi anime illustration of a female android technician in an industrial repair room, ideal for cyberpunk character art and futuristic concept visuals.

content: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of {argument name="character name" default="Izanagi"} reimagined as a divine futuristic warrior, shown from the back and slightly in profile in a rain-slick neon metropolis at night. The figure stands centered in the foreground with a calm, commanding presence, looking left over one shoulder, with {argument name="hair style" default="messy black layered hair with a braided strand"} and a youthful masculine silhouette. His body is an intricate fusion of human and machine: glossy black biomechanical arms, shoulders, and torso with exposed cables, metallic joints, and elegant gold-lit circuitry. He wears flowing white ceremonial robes inspired by Shinto and imperial Japanese garments, layered in torn, wind-swept translucent fabric with subtle gold embroidery, tassels, cords, and ornamental clasps, draped over the cybernetic body like sacred vestments. In his right hand he holds a luminous katana angled downward, the blade blazing with white-gold energy, with an ornate guard and glowing reflections across the wet ground. Behind his head is a huge radiant circular halo made of holographic golden concentric rings, arcane circuitry, and celestial interface lines, creating the effect of a divine techno-mandala. In the mid-background stands a large red torii gate, framed by towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in dense windows and vertical city lights. The street surface is glossy with rain and mirrors the sword glow and city illumination. Fill the scene with drifting sparks, floating embers, fine mist, cinematic backlighting, and dramatic contrast between dark steel tones and {argument name="accent color" default="white and gold"}. Ultra-detailed, epic, mythic, photorealistic concept art, high contrast, sharp focus, volumetric lighting, reflective surfaces, intricate costume design, Japanese myth fused with sci-fi futurism, vertical composition.
title: Cyberpunk Izanagi Divine Warrior
description: A dramatic vertical concept-art portrait of Izanagi as a cyberpunk god-warrior, ideal for mythological sci-fi key art and poster-style character generation.

content: A highly detailed anime-style cyberpunk dressing-room scene viewed from slightly behind a young woman seated at a vanity with a three-panel mirror. She has a short bob haircut in {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"}, with a black X-shaped hair clip on the side, pale skin, and a slim build. Her face is mostly hidden by angle and reflection composition. She wears a futuristic black, white, and neon-accented streetwear jacket with a hood, tech patches, straps, and glossy materials over a revealing top, plus black thigh-highs. Large RGB-lit over-ear headphones rest around her neck, glowing in magenta, cyan, and green. One visible upper arm has luminous holographic tattoo-like circuitry patterns in pink and blue. The mirror creates an infinite reflection tunnel of her repeated image receding into the distance, with at least 8 visible repeated reflections of her head and shoulders in the center panels. In the right mirror panel, her reflected pose shows one hand lifted near her mouth in a thoughtful, slightly shy gesture. The vanity surface is crowded with cosmetics and desk items: around 20 visible objects including lipstick tubes, makeup brushes in holders, perfume or skincare bottles, compact cases, small jars, a keyboard with pink backlighting, and a smartphone or small display device. Add a small round neon cat-face desk clock or speaker on the front right corner glowing cyan and pink. Surround the room with shelves filled with anime figurines and collectible statues on both left and right sides, visible in the background and edges of frame. Lighting is moody and cinematic with saturated purple, pink, and electric blue neon, glossy reflections on glass and plastic, soft bloom, and a cozy futuristic gamer-bedroom atmosphere. Composition should feel intimate, polished, and luxurious, with the seated character centered toward the lower middle, the tri-fold mirror dominating the scene, and the infinite mirror corridor drawing the eye deep into the image. Ultra-detailed, sharp focus on foreground objects and reflections, premium anime illustration, cyberpunk beauty aesthetic.
title: Cyberpunk Anime Vanity Mirror Scene
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style cyberpunk portrait scene of a pink-haired girl at a neon-lit vanity, ideal for character art, mood illustrations, and futuristic bedroom aesthetics.

content: A bright, whimsical underwater 2D game scene in a polished children’s animation style, shown as a full-screen level screenshot inside a rounded-rectangle game viewport. The setting is a colorful coral reef with a sandy seabed and a pale stone path winding from the foreground into the distance at center, creating depth. Sunbeams stream down through clear blue water from above, with many small air bubbles floating throughout the scene. Surround the path with soft, toy-like coral formations and sea plants in pastel pink, peach, lavender, turquoise, and mint, plus rocky ledges on both sides. Place 2 starfish in the foreground, one purple on the lower left rock and one pink-orange on the lower right. Add 2 translucent pink jellyfish, one left of center and one right of center, both gently glowing. Scatter 6 glowing pink clam shells along and beside the path, each emitting a soft magical aura. Add 4 golden-orange collectible shells with a pearl-like center, positioned near the middle play area. Include 2 large purple balloon-like jelly obstacles with white outlines and short dangling tentacles, one in the lower center-left and one in the mid-right. Near the left-center foreground, place a cute mermaid puppy character inspired by a preschool cartoon rescue dog: small smiling puppy face, big expressive eyes, light brown and cream fur, pink head accessory, teal mermaid tail, playful cheerful pose as if moving forward. On the right side, add a faint dashed circular target marker over the environment. Overlay simple mobile-game UI in Chinese: at the top left, two white rounded pill buttons, one reading "收贝壳" and one reading "1/5"; at the top right, a white circular pause button with "II". At the bottom center, place 3 white rounded instruction buttons with blue-gray text: "方向键 / WASD", "空格 / 回车：泡泡", and "Esc 回地图". Make the whole image glossy, soft-lit, kid-friendly, high-saturation but pastel-balanced, with a dreamy fantasy reef atmosphere and clean casual game-art composition.

content: A cute children’s 3D game screenshot in a bright underwater world, shown from a slightly elevated third-person view inside a colorful seaweed maze. The scene has a soft, glossy, toy-like look with rounded shapes, smooth clay-style materials, pastel-saturated colors, and cinematic god rays shining down through clear blue water. In the maze, a small mermaid puppy inspired by Coral from Paw Patrol stands near the lower-left quadrant, smiling with a friendly heroic expression. She has a light tan puppy face, big expressive eyes, pink-purple mermaid-themed accessories, and a small mermaid tail, designed in an adorable family-friendly animated style. Near her on the sandy seabed is a visible pair of scissors, the hidden-object target. The maze walls are made of dense green and teal seaweed with rounded pebble borders, creating winding paths across the center of the scene. The seabed is pale golden sand with caustic light patterns, scattered tiny shells and stones, and many floating air bubbles. Around the maze are whimsical coral-rock formations in blue, purple, and turquoise, including 1 shell-shaped treasure alcove on the left with a starfish above it and 1 large open pink clam shell with a pearl on the right. On the right side of the play area are 2 turtles: 1 larger light-green turtle and 1 smaller brown-green turtle, plus 3 separate clumps of upright sea plants in the open sand. Add a translucent white cross-shaped path marker or objective indicator over the center of the maze. Present it as a polished mobile game interface framed by a rounded rectangular screen. Include 6 UI elements total: top left a pill-shaped white label with the Chinese text “找剪刀”, next to it a white rounded counter reading “0/3”, top right a circular white pause button with a pause icon, and along the bottom center 3 white rounded instruction buttons labeled “方向键 / WASD”, “空格 / 回车：剪刀”, and “Esc 回地图”. The overall mood is comforting, playful, magical, and reassuring, like an educational hide-and-seek mini-game for a sick child, with high-end casual game art and a clean app-store-quality presentation.

content:
A dramatic dark fantasy mecha lineup on a black smoky studio-like background, rendered as ultra-detailed concept art with a wide cinematic composition. Show exactly 6 sinister biomechanical figures standing side by side on a glossy reflective floor, all designed as parts or forms of a combining robot set. The overall design language is gothic, infernal, and baroque: blackened steel, tarnished silver armor, serrated edges, thorn-like protrusions, skeletal filigree, red glowing cores and eyes, with subtle white-metal highlights and traces of crimson energy. The mood is ominous, majestic, and apocalyptic.

From left to right: first, a towering humanoid overlord mech, the largest figure in the lineup, with a crown-like halo ring behind the head, huge layered black feathered or blade-like wings draping downward, ornate chest armor with a bright central core, multiple red glowing orbs embedded asymmetrically, and a long staff or spear held diagonally. Second, a tall slender angelic-demonic humanoid mech with an elongated body, spiked antler-like crest, narrow waist, blade-like hanging armor panels, and red glowing shoulder nodes, posed upright and regal. Third, a beast unit on four legs, low and aggressive like a demonic wolf or draconic hound, covered in curved blade armor and long swept-back horns, with glowing red eyes and an arched tail or spine silhouette. Fourth, a heavy quadruped siege unit, bulkier and more armored, with a forward head assembly and two large circular shield-like wheel structures mounted on its sides, full of radial spikes and a glowing red core at the center of one wheel. Fifth, a centaur-like or upright beast warrior mech with long legs, layered armor, horned head, and a sharp avian-draconic profile, slimmer than the heavy unit but still imposing, with red lights in the chest and head. Sixth, a symmetrical winged emblem-like unit resembling a mechanical phoenix crest rather than a humanoid body, with two broad metallic wings spread outward around a central halo ring and a tapered hanging tail piece set with 3 visible red gem-like cores.

Keep the palette nearly monochrome except for the glowing reds. Emphasize razor-sharp silhouettes, intricate engravings, layered armor plates, cables and skeletal mechanical details, smoke drifting behind the figures, and faint reflections beneath their feet. The image should feel like a premium concept sheet for a {argument name="theme" default="dark combining robot"} in the style of hyper-detailed dark fantasy sci-fi illustration. Use a panoramic aspect ratio, front-facing lineup presentation, and high contrast lighting that picks out metallic edges against the deep black background.
title: Dark Fantasy Combining Mecha Lineup
description: A wide concept-art lineup of six gothic biomechanical robot forms, ideal for generating a sinister combining mecha design sheet or key visual.

content: A polished anime-style full-body illustration of a {argument name="character type" default="young Native American woman"} standing in a sunlit prairie, with a calm, dignified presence and SFW presentation. She has {argument name="hair color" default="black"} shoulder-length hair with soft layered strands and side bangs, decorated with 2 feather ornaments and several beaded hair cords in red, blue, and white. Her outfit is a traditional-inspired tan buckskin dress with long fringe in 3 main areas: across the chest, around the waist, and along the skirt hem. The dress includes 4 visible geometric beadwork accents: a patterned neckline trim, a wide beaded belt, a beaded thigh band near the lower skirt, and a matching beaded wrist cuff. She also wears layered beaded necklaces, including 1 large circular medallion pendant and 2 hanging feather-and-bead necklace strands. Place 1 brown-and-white pinto horse standing just behind her right side, clearly visible from head to legs, looking toward the viewer. Set the scene in an open field of tall grass and wildflowers with rolling hills in the distance, under a vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds. Use warm afternoon sunlight, gentle breeze in the hair and fringe, detailed fabric texture, natural skin shading, and a cinematic composition. The image should feel elegant, respectful, and picturesque, with vibrant colors, high detail, clean linework, soft painterly rendering, and a vertical portrait composition.

content: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a fashionable fox-eared young man sitting casually on the edge of a floating industrial platform in a vast vertical steampunk city. He has messy layered {argument name="hair color" default="light blond"} hair with a small streak of deep magenta near one side, 2 large fox ears with pale inner fur, and a fluffy cream-colored fox tail curling behind him. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat square censor block centered over the face. He wears a glossy black bomber jacket embroidered with scattered floral patterns in 2 colors, red-pink and violet-blue, with ribbed cuffs and collar striped in dark red and black. Under it is a black graphic T-shirt with ornate gold lettering and emblem details, partially hidden by layered straps and necklaces. His outfit includes loose black cargo-style pants with zipper details, black socks with small gold lettering, and chunky black platform shoes with bright magenta laces. Add multiple silver rings, black suspenders or harness straps with metal buckles, and a long olive-gold hanging belt strap draped off the platform. Pose him in a relaxed seated posture with 1 knee raised and 1 leg extended diagonally downward, left arm resting over the raised knee and right hand planted beside him. The mood is cool, urban, and slightly rebellious. The background is an intricate labyrinth of towering pale teal and off-white mechanical structures, stacked platforms, scaffolding, hanging chains, exposed cables, suspended boxes, and several round clocks embedded in the architecture, creating a dense vertical futuristic-steampunk environment fading into atmospheric haze. Use soft daylight, muted pastel industrial colors, fine linework, delicate ink-and-watercolor rendering, crisp fabric highlights, and a polished contemporary anime illustration aesthetic.

content:
Monochromatic grayscale illustration, 3D-rendered character, clean instructional reference sheet.
White background, comic-style cell grid layout, technical diagram aesthetic.
[LAYOUT]
4×4 grid layout (16 panels total).
Each panel separated by thin black border lines.
Panels are evenly sized and consistently aligned.
Each cell is clearly numbered from 1 to 16.
[CHARACTER]
{argument name="subject" default="Young female dancer with an athletic build, ponytail hairstyle, wearing a crop top, baggy pants, and sneakers"}.
The same character must appear consistently in all panels.
[PANEL STRUCTURE – per cell]
Top-left: bold number badge + {argument name="language" default="Korean"} title text
Center: full-body character pose illustration
Bottom-left: {argument name="language" default="Korean"} description text (3–4 lines)
Overlay: directional arrows indicating movement flow
[ARROWS / MOTION INDICATORS]
Curved arrows, straight arrows, and circular rotation indicators.
Arrows should be placed around the character to clearly show movement direction and flow.
[RENDERING STYLE]
Highly detailed 3D sculpted style.
Soft studio lighting with subtle shadows.
No color — grayscale only.
Clean linework, polished finish, game concept art quality.
[NEGATIVE PROMPT]
No background scenery.
No color tones.
No additional characters.
No cluttered or complex backgrounds.

The sword is tall, dark steel with a broad blade and ornate crossguard, extending vertically from the ground near the left side of the image to above the frame. The pose is one-knee kneeling, torso upright, head slightly bowed toward the sword, conveying reverence, mourning, or determination. Set in a ruined stone corridor or ancient city passage with towering blurred walls on both sides, soft fog, floating dust motes, and a cold blue-white backlight pouring from above and behind, creating rim light around her hair and armor. The top has a large circular medallion with a faceted heart-shaped gem in the center, surrounded by an ornate ring featuring exactly 1 large five-pointed star at the top center, 8 small five-pointed stars around the ring, and 4 curling decorative swirl motifs. Small symmetrical angel wings extend left and right from the lower sides of the circular head. Beneath the medallion is a large bow with a small heart-shaped jewel at its center and two ribbon tails hanging down. The handle is long and cylindrical with a spiral twist pattern, with exactly 1 additional heart emblem mounted near the upper part of the grip, and it ends in a rounded bulb-like pommel with vertical grooves. content: A heartwarming stylized 3D animated forest village scene at golden hour, showing 2 adorable insect characters meeting on a cobblestone path between tiny mushroom-roof cottages. In the left foreground, a cute {argument name="main insect type" default="ladybug"} crouches low with an oversized glossy black head, huge expressive brown eyes, a small smiling mouth, short antennae with rounded tips, and a tiny {argument name="accessory color" default="red"} bow near one antenna. Its shell is bright {argument name="shell color" default="red"} with distinct black spots, and its body is dark charcoal black with soft rounded limbs. In the right midground, a cheerful small {argument name="second insect type" default="bee"} hovers slightly above the ground facing the larger insect, with a similarly oversized head, big sparkling eyes, delicate translucent wings, tiny antennae, and little forelegs lifted as if speaking excitedly. The setting is an enchanted bug-sized woodland hamlet with 3 visible cottages, rounded wooden doors, curved stone walls, moss, vines, flowers, and leafy plants framing the path. Warm cinematic sunlight filters through the trees from the upper right, creating glowing rim light, soft bokeh, and floating firefly-like particles. Use a shallow depth of field, low camera angle at insect eye level, rich autumn-green and golden tones, highly detailed textures, soft global illumination, whimsical family-film mood, Pixar-like stylized realism, and a subtle dreamy double-exposure feel with faint overlapping light or ghosted highlights in parts of the frame.
title: Whimsical Ladybug and Bee Village Scene
description: This prompt generates a cinematic 3D animated-style image of two cute insects meeting in an enchanted woodland village, ideal for storybook art or family-friendly fantasy illustrations.

content: A highly detailed anime fantasy illustration of a tall elegant woman resembling an ice sorceress or qilin-inspired warrior, shown in a full-body three-quarter back view with her head turned slightly away, standing in a luminous snowy mountain landscape filled with soft pink cherry blossoms. She has {argument name="hair color" default="very light icy blue"} hair, extremely long, thick, and flowing in the wind with layered strands, soft bangs, curled tips, and a loose ahoge on top. Two dark curved horn-like ornaments with subtle red patterning rise from either side of her head. Her face is obscured by a flat rectangular blur block in a pale lavender-gray tone. She wears an ornate fantasy bodysuit and dress in black, white, periwinkle, and sapphire blue with gold filigree armor details: a black fitted chest piece, detached translucent bell sleeves with blue crystal-like feather cuffs, a backless white-and-blue upper garment, intricate gold waist armor with a glowing blue gemstone centerpiece, sheer black tights with gold geometric accents, layered translucent blue fabric panels, and exactly 3 visible red tassel ornaments hanging from the waist and side sashes. Her right arm is extended with an open gloved hand, levitating a glowing translucent blue water sphere containing swirling yin-yang-like currents. Around her are curling arcs of water and icy energy ribbons. The background is a dreamy ethereal alpine scene with 1 distant pagoda-like tower on the right, misty snow-covered peaks, frosted trees, sparkling atmosphere, drifting petals, and pastel blossom clusters framing the foreground and upper left corner. Use soft radiant backlighting, iridescent highlights, polished anime rendering, delicate gradients, crisp decorative costume detail, magical fantasy mood, cool blue and lavender palette with pink accents, vertical composition, no text, no extra characters.

content:
Create a high-resolution vertical character concept poster with a luxury pink and white aesthetic, blending elegance with edgy, modern fashion. The layout should feel like a premium magazine profile with clean sections and perfect grid alignment.

Main subject: A unique young woman (not resembling any real person), with long silky dark hair featuring subtle pink highlights. She has a confident, calm expression with a slightly mysterious aura. She wears a black and pink fusion outfit (mix of streetwear and idol fashion) with glossy textures, lace, and metallic accents. Lighting is soft but dramatic, with neon pink glow against dark tones.

Top section:
Large hero portrait on one side. On the other side, include a sleek profile panel with elegant English text:

Name: {argument name="character name" default="Nyra Vale"}
Age: {argument name="age" default="23"}
Height: {argument name="height" default="170 cm"}
Style: Dark Elegance

Short description:
“She doesn’t follow trends—she defines them. Quiet strength, sharp vision, and a presence that speaks without words.”

Add a Traits section with stylish progress bars:

Confidence
Creativity
Discipline
Charisma
Emotional Depth

Middle section:
Grid of 5–6 small portraits showing different expressions (soft smile, intense gaze, playful smirk, thoughtful, confident).

Lower sections:

Full-body poses (front, side, walking pose, power stance, casual stance).
Outfit variations (street luxe, stage outfit, minimal chic).
Accessories panel (heels, boots, chains, rings, handbags, hairstyles).

Text tone:
Strong, meaningful, and confident—focused on individuality, self-worth, and silent power. Avoid filler text.

Style:
Ultra-detailed, 4K quality, glossy magazine finish, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, balanced contrast, modern editorial layout, perfectly aligned grid.
title: Luxury Fashion Character Concept Poster
description: A detailed prompt for creating a high-resolution magazine-style character poster featuring a custom female character with a luxury pink and dark fashion aesthetic. It includes layout instructions for grid alignment, profile panels, and progress bars.

content: A highly detailed isometric toy-diorama illustration of a crowded Venetian canal district in a cute chibi style, designed as a hidden-object “find the duck” scene. Show a bustling old Venice street and canal packed with exactly hundreds of tiny stylized people with oversized heads, glossy eyes, and varied outfits, filling nearly every walkway, bridge, balcony, gondola, and café seat. The composition is a vertical overhead three-quarter view looking down a narrow canal running through the center, with a stone footbridge crossing the canal in the upper middle and dense warm-toned historic buildings on both sides. Architecture should feature terracotta roof tiles, stucco walls in faded orange, ochre, cream, and brick red, green shutters, flower boxes, striped awnings, hanging signs, lanterns, and richly detailed shopfronts. Include a tall bell tower on the upper left with a sign reading “PONTE DEI SOSPIRI,” a red awning reading “Cafe Venezia” on the right side near the bridge, a large “TRATTORIA” sign on the upper right building, a green sign reading “AL VAPORETTO San Marco - Rialto,” a striped awning with “GELATO” on the left, a small “FOTO” sign, a kiosk in the lower left plaza labeled “CARNEVALE DI VENEZIA,” a glowing shop on the lower right labeled “MURANO GLASS,” and a small “SUPRI” sign near the right canal edge. Fill the canal with exactly 7 gondolas, each with passengers and gondoliers in striped shirts and straw hats, plus red-and-white striped mooring poles in the water. Populate the square and canal edges with market tables, café tables under exactly 2 large parasols, carnival masks, balloons, framed art, pastries, glassware, souvenirs, flowers, and streetlamps. In windows, balconies, and doorways, place more chibi figures watching the scene. Hide exactly 1 small yellow rubber duck in an upper-right window beside the “TRATTORIA” building so it is visible but easy to miss. Add a decorative signboard in the top-right corner that reads “Find the duck!” with a duck icon. Render everything in an ultra-dense handcrafted miniature aesthetic with crisp detail, saturated warm colors, soft cinematic lighting, playful travel-poster charm, and a whimsical vacation puzzle-book feeling.
title: Hidden Duck in Chibi Venice
description: A dense whimsical Venice hidden-object illustration packed with chibi tourists, gondolas, shops, and one tiny duck, ideal for travel-themed puzzle art or social media games.

content: A highly detailed isometric miniature diorama of Venice in a whimsical chibi style, designed as a busy hidden-character puzzle scene. The setting is a sunlit Venetian canal district packed with tiny cute travelers and locals, viewed from a slightly elevated angle so the canal, bridges, piazza, storefronts, and upper facades are all visible at once. Warm terracotta buildings with weathered stucco walls, flower boxes, striped awnings, shuttered windows, balconies, rooftop chimneys, and ivy frame both sides of a narrow turquoise canal. In the distance, elegant Venetian architecture includes a large arched bridge, domes, towers, and a clock tower, creating depth and a postcard-like skyline. The streets and canal are extremely crowded with exactly over 150 chibi characters, each with oversized heads, small bodies, glossy eyes, varied skin tones, and distinct outfits, hairstyles, hats, and accessories, posed walking, chatting, shopping, sitting, rowing, or sightseeing. Many wear straw boater hats, striped shirts, dresses, vests, jackets, and travel clothes in cheerful colors. Several gondolas move through the canal, each carrying tiny passengers, with gondoliers in classic Venetian striped attire. Include exactly 3 stone pedestrian bridges crossing the canal, multiple gondolas, many canal posts, ornate green street lamps, café tables, market stands, pigeons on the pavement, and souvenir displays. Add a playful scavenger-hunt mood with a small hanging sign in the upper right that reads {argument name="headline text" default="Find the duck!"} and shows a cute yellow rubber duck icon. Hide exactly 2 small yellow ducks in the scene, subtly placed among the crowd and canal area so viewers can search for them. Visible shop and street signs should include HOTEL CA' DEL SORRISO on the left building, GELATO on a striped awning storefront, TRATTORIA alla Gondola on the right, SERVIZIO GONDOLE on a green canal sign near the center foreground, VENEZIA MASK on a souvenir stall, and CARNEVALE DI VENEZIA on a poster display at the lower right. Include carnival masks for sale, café seating, a market umbrella, and tiny decorative details everywhere. Render it as ultra-detailed, polished 3D storybook art with toy-like textures, soft global illumination, vibrant Mediterranean colors, crisp focus, and a charming travel-poster atmosphere centered on {argument name="city" default="Venice"}, featuring a hidden mascot search for {argument name="hidden object" default="yellow duck"}, in the playful world of {argument name="series name" default="Ruhia"}.
title: Hidden Duck in Chibi Venice
description: This prompt generates a dense, adorable Venice travel diorama packed with chibi characters and hidden-object details, ideal for scavenger-hunt puzzle art and social media travel posts.

content: A richly detailed miniature-diorama style illustration of a busy Venetian canal street in warm afternoon light, designed like a whimsical “find the hidden duck” scene. Show a narrow turquoise canal running through the center with 4 black gondolas, each with striped-shirt gondoliers and tiny tourists, crossed by 1 ornate white stone footbridge crowded with people. Fill the scene with dozens of cute chibi travelers and shopkeepers in a handcrafted toy-like style, with oversized heads, soft expressive faces, textured clothing, and highly detailed props. Surround the canal with colorful old Venice buildings in peach, terracotta, cream, and yellow stucco, red tile roofs, green shutters, balconies, flower boxes, laundry lines, lanterns, and narrow shopfronts. Include 6 clearly readable shop or sign texts placed naturally in the environment: “TRATTORIA,” “MASCHERE,” “CALLE DEI COLORI,” “CAFFE LAGUNA,” “VENEZIA,” “FIORI,” plus a small chalkboard sign reading “GONDOLA SERENATA.” On the right, feature a Venetian mask shop overflowing with ornate masks and carnival decorations; on the left, a trattoria with outdoor diners; in the lower left, a small café kiosk; in the lower center, a postcard stand labeled VENEZIA; in the lower right, a flower cart labeled FIORI; near the center bottom, an artist painting at an easel and a street musician with a guitar. Scatter luggage, tables, pastries, postcards, flower pots, market goods, and canal posts throughout the cobblestone street to create a dense travel-market atmosphere. Add a decorative framed game sign in the upper-right corner with a tiny duck icon and the text {argument name="headline text" default="Find the duck!"}. Hide exactly 1 tiny yellow rubber duck subtly among the lower-left luggage area near the café so it is visible but easy to miss. Use a high-angle isometric composition, storybook travel-poster charm, ultra-detailed handcrafted textures, vibrant colors, cozy European ambiance, and a playful seek-and-find aesthetic.
title: Hidden Duck in Miniature Venice
description: A dense, whimsical Venice diorama scene for creating a playful seek-and-find travel illustration with a hidden rubber duck.

content: A highly detailed isometric miniature diorama illustration of a lively Venetian canal square in warm golden daylight, rendered like an ultra-cute handcrafted travel scene with chibi doll-like tourists, tiny shopfronts, textured stone pavement, flower boxes, striped awnings, and sparkling turquoise water. The composition is densely packed and whimsical, designed as a hidden-object scene titled on a decorative sign in the upper right that reads {argument name="headline text" default="Find the duck! 🐤"}. Show a charming Venice setting with a central arched stone bridge crossing a narrow canal, multiple gondolas in the water, and dozens of small travelers and locals in colorful outfits, hats, sunglasses, cameras, and shopping bags. Place a souvenir kiosk with postcards and signs, a flower stall overflowing with bright bouquets, a café terrace with red-and-white checkered tables, a carnival mask shop display, stacked vintage suitcases near the canal, striped mooring poles, laundry hanging between buildings, wrought-iron street lamps, and old pastel buildings in peach, ochre, and cream with green shutters and terracotta roofs. Include visible storefront signs reading “MASCHERE,” “CAFFÈ,” “SOUVENIRS,” “FIORI,” and “VENEZIA.” Hide exactly {argument name="duck count" default="4"} small yellow rubber ducks throughout the scene as a playful search challenge, with one especially noticeable duck perched near the stacked suitcases and the others subtly blended among the busy market details. Add one tiny fluffy white dog near the flower stall. The overall style should feel like a premium collectible toy-city illustration, richly layered, joyful, cozy, and travel-themed, with soft depth of field, crisp miniature textures, and a bustling storybook atmosphere. Use {argument name="city" default="Venice"} as the location inspiration, and make the crowd feature {argument name="character style" default="cute chibi travelers"} in varied poses such as walking, chatting, taking photos, shopping, sitting at the café, standing on the bridge, and riding in gondolas.

content: A hyper-detailed symmetrically composed anime-inspired cyberpunk illustration on a flat, saturated {argument name="background color" default="crimson red"} background. Centered in the frame, a solitary androgynous warrior sits slouched on a dark wooden chair, legs apart, hands relaxed between the knees, projecting calm menace and fallen-divinity energy. The face is intentionally obscured and unreadable, framed by an elaborate black samurai-style horned helmet with 2 curved horns and dense mechanical ornamentation. The figure has 2 large white feathered wings spread outward from the back. Behind and around the seated body, the composition splits into two contrasting organic-tech masses: on the left side, a chaotic storm of 1 dense tangle of teal and dark blue cables, wires, plugs, circuit fragments, and techno-organic tendrils; on the right side, 1 explosive bloom of pink cherry blossoms, petals, curling branches, and ribbon-like floral swirls. Place 1 upright katana behind the figure on the right side, angled slightly inward, with a black handle and visible guard. Dress the character in a mixed streetwear and armored outfit: a split-tone jacket with the left half in dark cyan-black circuitry patterns and the right half in pale pink floral patterns, black fitted pants with asymmetrical detailing, mismatched striped socks in cyan and pink, and chunky high-top sneakers with oversized soles, one predominantly cyan-black and the other predominantly pink-white, both covered in graphic paneling and straps. The hands should look partly mechanical or armored, with long sharp fingers. Flood the image with tiny decorative fragments, petals, paint-like flecks, and micro-details so the entire scene feels intricately hand-inked. Use a high-contrast palette dominated by {argument name="accent color 1" default="teal blue"}, {argument name="accent color 2" default="pink"}, black, and white against the red field. Render in an ultra-detailed manga-meets-graffiti style with crisp linework, dense textures, poster-like frontal framing, and a balanced fusion of angelic, demonic, floral, and cybernetic motifs.

In the center, a girl with very long pale lavender hair in twin buns and flowing lengths wears an elegant dark green dress with gold trim and white lace cuffs, smiling mischievously while holding up a large hardcover book titled "Talk of Cthulhu" with a dramatic occult monster cover; above her is handwritten Japanese text reading "これで全員 一時的狂気ね" with a small heart. On the right, an orange-haired girl in a white lab coat with a stethoscope and ID badge reads a paper nervously, with handwritten Japanese text above her that says "SAN値が ピンチ！" with energetic accent lines. The tabletop is packed with exactly 10 polyhedral dice scattered across the center, assorted papers, 3 visible character sheets or note pages, 4 large map sheets, 2 mugs with dark emblems, 1 glass of iced cola, 1 plate of cookies, 1 bag of potato chips labeled in Japanese, 1 small standing sign reading "発狂中", 1 black ink bottle, 1 white feather quill, 2 closed occult hardcovers stacked at the lower right, and 1 large open illustrated monster book on the right. The room behind them has tall bookshelves full of old books, framed occult artwork including a tentacled creature image, a large aged wall map with pinned markings and strings, candles, wood furniture, and a moody Victorian occult-library atmosphere. Composition is a wide cinematic group shot from slightly above table height, highly rendered, warm brown and amber lighting, intricate textures, expressive anime faces and hair, playful horror-comedy tone, premium light novel or visual novel key art quality.

content: A full-body anime illustration of 3 humanoid AI assistant idol girls standing side by side on a glossy futuristic concert stage, shown in a straight-on front view with their full figures visible from head to shoes. They are designed as the same base android model with subtle personality differences expressed mainly through costume design, pose, and color balance rather than body type. All 3 have short silver-gray bob hair with soft waves, large over-ear mechanical headphones, pale skin, youthful idol styling, and sleek visible robotic limbs with glossy red-and-black plating and heart-shaped accent motifs. The setting is a large indoor live venue with steel truss rigging overhead, bright white and pink-purple stage spotlights, giant LED screens in the background, and reflective black stage flooring with glowing grid lines and mirror-like reflections. The overall mood is polished, cute, futuristic, and high-end, with dramatic concert lighting and crisp detailed rendering. The left girl wears a mostly black idol outfit with red accents: a cropped translucent black jacket over a short black dress or romper with a flared skirt, black armored thigh-high mechanical legs, chunky black platform boots, red gloves, and small heart details throughout; she stands with knees slightly inward and both hands pressed to her cheeks in a shy, affectionate pose, with a sweet blushing expression. The center girl wears a balanced red-and-white idol outfit: a white sleeveless top with red heart accents, a layered burgundy-red frilled mini skirt, fully exposed red-and-black robotic arms and legs, and red platform shoes; she stands in a neutral straight upright pose with one hand raised lightly near her face, presenting the clearest full-body view of the android construction. The right girl wears a mostly red idol dress with black lace-like detailing, a black waist belt, a flared skirt with white frilled underskirt, red-and-black knee armor, and red platform shoes; she stands elegantly with one arm bent near her chest and the other arm extended outward, as if introducing the audience. Keep the trio evenly spaced across the frame. Emphasize the contrast between soft idol fashion and hard mechanical anatomy, with 3 distinct costume variations in black-dominant, red-and-white balanced, and red-dominant palettes. Highly detailed anime key visual, ultra-clean linework, glossy materials, soft facial shading, sparkling highlights, cinematic stage atmosphere, and premium promotional art quality for the idol unit {argument name="group name" default="Hallucinations"}.

Monochrome grayscale illustration, 3D-rendered character, clean {argument name="sheet type" default="instructional reference sheet"}, white background, comic-style cell grid layout, technical diagram aesthetic.

[LAYOUT]
{argument name="grid layout" default="4×4 grid layout"} with a total of 16 panels. Each panel is separated by thin black border lines. Cells are numbered from 1 to 16, with consistent panel sizes.

[CHARACTER]
 image1 (the same character appears consistently in all panels)

[PANEL STRUCTURE – per cell]

Top-left: bold number badge + {argument name="text content" default="English title text"}

Center: full-body character pose illustration

Bottom-left: English description text (3–4 lines)

Overlay: directional arrows indicating movement

[ARROWS / MOTION INDICATORS]
Curved arrows, straight arrows, and circular rotation indicators placed around the character to show motion flow and direction.

[RENDERING STYLE]
Highly detailed 3D sculpted style, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, no color, grayscale shading, clean linework, game concept art quality.

[NEGATIVE]
No background scenery, no color tones, no additional characters, no complex background.
title: 3D Technical Reference Sheet
description: A complex technical diagram prompt for creating a monochrome 4x4 character sheet with motion indicators and numbered panels.

content: A full-body anime illustration of a cute gothic lolita girl seated at a small round table in a pastel goth tea-room, facing the viewer with a confident mischievous smile. She has {argument name="hair color" default="ash taupe brown"} hair in twin tails tied with 2 black flower ribbons, soft bangs, pink-magenta eyes, and a tiny black bat hair clip. Her pose is relaxed and flirty: one elbow on the tabletop, one cheek resting on her hand, the other hand raised toward the viewer holding a black playing card with a large pink heart and 4 small pink crosses. She wears a black long-sleeved sailor-style dress with a white collar, oversized pink bow at the chest, heart-shaped pendant at the bow center, pleated skirt, black choker with a silver cross charm, layered silver necklaces, black thigh-high stockings, heart-ring garter straps on both thighs, and chunky black platform Mary Jane shoes with multiple straps, silver buckles, heart details, and cross accents. Add small cute earrings and delicate gothic accessories. The room uses a limited {argument name="accent color" default="black and pastel pink"} palette with soft lavender-gray striped wallpaper. Include 2 black curtain drapes with pink scalloped trim at the upper left and upper right corners, 1 black cross wall ornament, 1 black bat wall ornament, and 2 pink heart wall ornaments. On the left shelving, show exactly 2 teaware pieces: 1 white teapot with a pink heart and 1 white teacup with a pink heart. The girl sits on a black chair with a pink backrest shaped like a heart silhouette. In front of her is 1 small round black table with a pink top. On the tabletop, depict a cute board game in progress: 1 rectangular board with alternating light and dark spaces, 4 player pawns total with 2 pink and 2 dark navy, 3 visible single cards near the board, and 3 separate card stacks on the right side of the table. Add 1 pink jelly dessert on a pedestal plate near the back right of the table. The floor is a large black-and-pink checkerboard. Style should be polished modern anime, crisp line art, soft cel shading, glossy eyes, delicate fabric folds, clean composition, charming pastel goth atmosphere, highly detailed accessories, vertical portrait framing, full body visible, centered character, whimsical and stylish.

content: A cinematic third-person in-game screenshot from a realistic ancient Chinese open-world RPG set at night in a luxurious pleasure district. The camera is positioned behind a tall male protagonist with long black hair tied half-up, wearing a dark embroidered hanfu-style robe, standing in the middle of a wet stone street and facing the entrance of an ornate brothel pavilion. The central building is richly detailed with carved wooden columns, glowing red lanterns, gold calligraphy plaques, and warm amber interior lighting spilling onto the street. A large horizontal signboard above the entrance reads “春院”. On the two front columns are vertical calligraphy couplets. Around the doorway and street are exactly 16 visible NPCs: 1 player character in the foreground seen from behind, 7 courtesans in flowing translucent silk hanfu dresses posed near the entrance and seated on stools, 6 pedestrians and guests scattered on the right side street and bridge area, and 2 seated figures inside the entrance area. The women wear elegant Tang/Song-inspired gowns in pale peach, pink, ivory, mint, and light gold, with exposed shoulders, layered gauze, elaborate updos, and hair ornaments; the men wear darker long robes. The ground is glossy from recent rain, reflecting lantern light. In the background on the right is a canal-town night scene with a stone bridge, multi-story traditional buildings, more lanterns, and dense atmospheric depth. The image should feel like a high-budget game demo, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, dramatic, moody, and sensual but not explicit. Overlay a full Chinese MMORPG HUD interface: top left circular player portrait with level 35, red and blue health and mana bars, small status icons; left side quest tracker with exactly 4 quest lines in Chinese; bottom left chat box with multiple Chinese messages and channel tabs; top right a circular minimap with the location text “清河县·怡春院 (1123, 885)” and exactly 8 small menu icons around it; bottom center a thin experience bar; bottom right an action bar with exactly 8 circular skill buttons, including green martial-arts skills, golden highlighted abilities, and a larger movement/jump button. Use {argument name="game screenshot style" default="ultra-realistic cinematic MMORPG UI"}, {argument name="setting" default="ancient Chinese red-light district at night"}, {argument name="main building sign" default="春院"}, {argument name="player outfit color" default="dark charcoal black"}, and {argument name="lighting mood" default="warm lantern glow with cool night shadows"}.
title: Ancient Chinese RPG Brothel Street UI

content:
Dance Sequence Instruction Sheet
[VISUAL STYLE]
A composition featuring a highly detailed 3D-rendered female dancer. Designed like a professional choreography guide with a technical, diagram-inspired layout. Clean white background, soft studio lighting, and strong contrast to highlight body movement and posture.
[GRID LAYOUT]
Structured 4×4 panel grid (16 frames total), evenly spaced with thin black divider lines. Each panel is identical in size and clearly numbered from 1 to 16 to show a continuous dance progression.
[CHARACTER]
Use {argument name="reference" default="image1"} as the base character. The same female dancer appears consistently across all panels with accurate likeness and proportions.
[WARDROBE]
The dancer wears a stylish, performance-ready outfit: a {argument name="clothing" default="well-fitted top paired with a short, flowy skirt"}. The look should feel modern and visually appealing while still practical for dance movement. Fabric should subtly respond to motion (slight flow and folds), even in grayscale.
[PANEL STRUCTURE – EACH FRAME]
Top-left: Step number + short dance move title (e.g., “Step 5 – Spin Transition”)
Center: Full-body pose capturing a precise moment in the choreography
Bottom-left: 3–4 lines of concise instruction describing the move
Overlay: Motion arrows and directional guides illustrating how the dancer transitions
[MOTION INDICATORS]
Incorporate curved arrows for fluid motion, straight arrows for directional steps, and circular indicators for spins or turns. Emphasize rhythm, weight shifts, and body isolation.
[RENDER QUALITY]
High-detail sculpted 3D style with smooth grayscale shading, subtle shadows, and clean linework. Maintain a polished, concept-art level finish with clarity in every pose.
[RESTRICTIONS]
No color, no background scenery, no extra characters, no visual clutter, only the dancer and instructional elements..
title: Dance Choreography Instruction Sheet
description: A technical prompt for creating a 3D-rendered dance sequence guide using a reference character for consistent posing across a grid layout.

content: A clean in-game screenshot mockup in the visual style of Minecraft Bedrock Edition, showing a custom teleport menu overlay titled {argument name="window title" default="Family Compass"}. The background is a bright outdoor Minecraft scene with blocky grass in the foreground, a line of leafy trees in the middle distance, and a pale blue sky with rectangular clouds. On the left side, a large Bedrock-style UI window dominates the frame, with a light gray panel, darker gray border, and a small close X in the top-right corner. Centered at the top of the window is the title text. Inside the panel, a dark header bar asks {argument name="prompt text" default="Where should we go?"}. Below it are exactly 4 large horizontal rectangular buttons stacked vertically with even spacing. The first button is highlighted bright green with white pixel-style text reading {argument name="primary button" default="Teleport to Player"}. The next 3 buttons are light gray with medium gray pixel-style text reading, in order, "Saved Locations", "Add Current Location", and "Remove Saved Location". In the lower-right foreground, partially cropped and held as if by the player, is an oversized pixel-art compass item with a tan face, gold rim, and a red needle angled diagonally downward, rendered in chunky Minecraft item icon style. Use authentic Minecraft Bedrock UI proportions, pixelated font, crisp blocky edges, soft in-game lighting, and a polished game-screenshot composition with the menu as the main focus.

content: A full-body anime illustration of a dreamy celestial girl floating diagonally across a pure white background, viewed from above as if weightless in open air. She has very long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="deep navy blue"} hair spreading in elegant ribbons around her body, with glossy highlights, loose strands, and star-shaped hair ornaments near one side of her head. Her face is softly obscured and de-emphasized, while the composition focuses on her delicate pose, costume, and swirling magical atmosphere. She wears a highly detailed white and blue sailor-inspired fantasy dress with translucent layered sleeves, frilled ruffles, sparkling lace, sheer fabric panels, and a large star-like crystal brooch at the chest. The outfit includes 5 clearly visible clothing elements: a short frilled dress, a sailor collar and neck ribbon, semi-transparent detached sleeves or draped chiffon layers, 1 white thigh-high stocking on one leg, and 1 dark blue starry thigh-high stocking on the other leg with a matching garter band. She is barefoot, with both feet visible. Her pose is graceful and drifting: one arm reaches upward with an open hand, the other hand rests near her chest, one leg extended and the other slightly bent. Surround her with a luminous constellation motif in cool blue tones, including exactly 6 prominent five-pointed star ornaments scattered around her, multiple tiny star sparkles, circular watercolor-like swirls, floating bubbles, and ornate crescent-ring filigree arcs framing parts of the image. Make the palette icy blue, cobalt, indigo, and white, with shimmering glitter textures, soft translucent overlays, crisp line art, and a light ethereal glow. The overall mood is magical, elegant, celestial, and serene, like a star maiden suspended in a winter night sky interpreted on a clean white canvas.
